pilot.title: Commercial Pilot
pilot.description: Fly commercial aircraft for airlines or cargo companies.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Physics & Maths (minimum 60%)
Appear for Class 1 Medical Examination (DGCA approved)
Enroll in a DGCA-approved Flying Training Organization (FTO)
Complete Student Pilot License (SPL) training
Complete Private Pilot License (PPL) - ~40-50 flying hours
Complete Commercial Pilot License (CPL) - total 200 flying hours
Clear all DGCA written exams (Air Regulations, Navigation, Meteorology, etc.)
Get type rating for specific aircraft (e.g., Boeing 737, Airbus A320)
Apply to airlines like IndiGo, Air India, SpiceJet, Vistara
top_institutes: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA), Rae Bareli

software_engineer.title: Software Engineer
software_engineer.description: Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems.
roadmap: Complete 12th with PCM or get any degree (BTech/BCA/BSc CS preferred)
Learn a programming language: Python or JavaScript first
Learn Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA) - very important for jobs
Build 2-3 personal projects and put on GitHub
Learn one specialization: Web Dev / App Dev / AI-ML / Cybersecurity
Do internships (even unpaid ones for experience)
Prepare for coding interviews (LeetCode, HackerRank)
Apply to companies or startups
Keep upgrading skills continuously
top_institutes: Self-learning via Coursera, Udemy, freeCodeCamp (also valid!)
software_engineer.cost_estimate: 1-10 Lakhs (depending on college) or nearly free via self-learning

doctor.title: Doctor (MBBS/MD)
doctor.description: Diagnose and treat patients, specialize in various medical fields.
roadmap: Complete 12th with PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) - aim for 85%+
Prepare for NEET-UG exam (very competitive)
Get admission to MBBS (5.5 years including 1 year internship)
Complete mandatory 1-year rotating internship
Register with Medical Council of India (MCI/NMC)
Option 1: Start practice as General Physician
Option 2: Appear for NEET-PG for MD/MS specialization (2-3 years)
Option 3: Pursue super-specialization (DM/MCh) - 3 more years
Join a hospital, clinic, or start own practice
top_institutes: Any government medical college via NEET
doctor.cost_estimate: Government: 5-15 Lakhs total | Private: 50 Lakhs - 1.5 Crore
doctor.duration: MBBS: 5.5 years | With PG: 8-10 years | Super-specialization: 11-13 years

data_scientist.title: Data Scientist / AI Engineer
data_scientist.description: Analyze large datasets, build ML models, extract insights to drive business decisions.
roadmap: Strong foundation in Maths: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Statistics
Learn Python deeply (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn)
Learn Machine Learning basics (scikit-learn)
Learn Deep Learning (TensorFlow or PyTorch)
Practice on Kaggle competitions
Learn SQL for data querying
Work on end-to-end projects (from data collection to deployment)
Learn cloud basics (AWS/GCP/Azure)
Build strong portfolio on GitHub
Apply to companies or research labs
data_scientist.cost_estimate: Nearly free via online resources or 5-15 Lakhs for formal degree

ias_officer.title: IAS / Civil Services Officer
ias_officer.description: Serve in Indian Administrative Service, manage government departments and policy implementation.
roadmap: Complete graduation in any subject (any university)
Start UPSC preparation early - ideally in 2nd or 3rd year of graduation
Study NCERT books first (Class 6-12) for all subjects
Cover UPSC syllabus: GS Paper 1,2,3,4 + Optional subject
Read newspaper daily (The Hindu / Indian Express)
Clear UPSC Prelims (objective type - 2 papers)
Clear UPSC Mains (9 papers including essay and GS)
Clear Personality Test / Interview
Based on rank: get IAS, IPS, IFS, IRS or other services
Complete LBSNAA training (for IAS)
top_institutes: Self-study with NCERT + PYQs is also sufficient
cons: Low initial salary vs private sector

ca.title: Chartered Accountant (CA)
ca.description: Handle financial auditing, taxation, accounting, and financial advisory for businesses and individuals.
roadmap: Register for CA Foundation after 12th (or directly after graduation - CA Direct Entry)
Clear CA Foundation (4 papers) - 6 months prep
Register for CA Intermediate
Complete 8 months study period
Clear CA Intermediate (Both Groups - 8 papers)
Complete Integrated Course on IT & Soft Skills (ICITSS)
Start 3-year Articleship under a CA firm
Complete Advanced ICITSS during articleship
Clear CA Final (Both Groups - 8 papers)
Register with ICAI - you are now a CA!
top_institutes: ICAI (Institute of Chartered Accountants of India) - official body
ca.cost_estimate: 2-4 Lakhs total for all levels + coaching
cons: High failure rates at each level

lawyer.title: Lawyer / Advocate
lawyer.description: Provide legal advice, represent clients in courts, draft legal documents.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Option A: 5-year integrated BA LLB / BBA LLB / B.Com LLB after 12th
Option B: 3-year LLB after any graduation
Appear for CLAT / LSAT / AILET for top law colleges
Complete internships at courts, law firms, NGOs during studies
Enroll with State Bar Council after degree
Complete 1-year training under senior advocate
Start practice in Civil / Criminal / Corporate law
Option: Crack AIBE (All India Bar Examination)
Build specialization: Criminal, Corporate, IPR, Constitutional law, etc.

salary.mid_level: 10 - 20 LPA (senior associate in law firm - 5 years)
salary.senior: 50 Lakhs - Crores (senior partner / top criminal lawyer)

entrepreneur.title: Entrepreneur / Startup Founder
entrepreneur.description: Start and build your own business or startup solving real problems.
roadmap: Identify a real problem you want to solve
Research the market - is there demand?
Learn basic business concepts: revenue, profit, burn rate, unit economics
Build a simple MVP (Minimum Viable Product) - test your idea cheaply
Get your first customers / users - even 10 real users is a start
Get feedback and improve
Consider funding: Bootstrapping → Angel investors → VC funding
Register your company (Private Limited / LLP / Sole Proprietorship)
Build a team as you grow
Scale up based on what works
entrepreneur.cost_estimate: Depends on business type - can start with 0 to lakhs

salary.mid_level: Highly variable - depends on business success

alternatives_if_fail: Return to job market with startup experience (valuable!)
entrance_exams: No entrance exam - but MBA from IIM helps for business knowledge

defense_officer.title: Defense Officer (Army / Navy / Air Force)
defense_officer.description: Serve as commissioned officer in Indian Armed Forces.
roadmap: Route 1 (NDA): After 12th - appear for NDA written exam (UPSC)
Clear NDA written exam (Mathematics + General Ability)
Clear SSB Interview (5-day psychological + physical test)
Join National Defence Academy, Khadakwasla - 3 years
Service training at respective academy (IMA/INS Zamorin/AFA)
Get commissioned as Lieutenant/Sub-Lieutenant/Flying Officer
Route 2 (CDS): After graduation - appear for CDS exam
Clear CDS written exam + SSB Interview
Join IMA Dehradun / OTA Chennai / Naval Academy / AFA Hyderabad
Commissioned officer training (1-1.5 years)
defense_officer.cost_estimate: Fully funded by government - you get stipend during training

graphic_designer.title: Graphic Designer / UI-UX Designer
graphic_designer.description: Create visual content for brands, apps, websites, and media.
roadmap: Learn design fundamentals: Color theory, Typography, Layout, Composition
Master design tools: Canva (beginner) → Adobe Photoshop → Adobe Illustrator → Figma
For UI/UX: Learn Figma deeply + user research basics
Build a strong portfolio of 10-15 diverse projects
Do freelance work on Fiverr / Upwork to gain real experience
Complete internships with agencies or startups
Learn basics of HTML/CSS (big advantage for UI designers)
Create a Behance / Dribbble profile
Apply to design agencies, startups, or go full freelance
top_institutes: NID (National Institute of Design) - top in India
graphic_designer.cost_estimate: Self-learning: Nearly free | Formal degree: 3-8 Lakhs
graphic_designer.duration: 6 months - 1 year to be job ready via self-learning

salary.senior: 20 - 40 LPA (Senior UX Designer at top companies)

aerospace_engineer.title: Aerospace Engineer
aerospace_engineer.description: Design and develop aircraft, spacecraft, satellites, and missiles. Work with ISRO, DRDO, HAL or private aerospace firms.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with 85%+
Get BTech in Aerospace/Aeronautical Engineering via JEE
Learn: Fluid Mechanics, Thermodynamics, Propulsion, Structural Analysis
Do internships at ISRO, DRDO, HAL or Mahindra Aerospace
Clear GATE or ISRO Centralized Recruitment Board exam
Join ISRO / DRDO / HAL as engineer
For abroad: target Boeing, Airbus, SpaceX (needs MS/PhD)
cons: Limited private sector jobs in India

civil_engineer.title: Civil Engineer
civil_engineer.description: Plan, design and build infrastructure — bridges, roads, dams, buildings, and water systems.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM and get BTech Civil Engineering
Learn AutoCAD, STAAD Pro, Revit
Do site internships during college
Clear GATE for government jobs (PWD, CPWD, Railways, NHAI)
OR join private firms: L&T, Shapoorji, DLF
Specialize in: Structural, Geotechnical, Environmental, or Transportation Engineering

mechanical_engineer.title: Mechanical Engineer
mechanical_engineer.description: Design, analyze, and manufacture mechanical systems — from car engines to industrial machines to robots.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM and get BTech Mechanical Engineering
Learn SolidWorks, CATIA, ANSYS
Focus on Thermodynamics, Manufacturing, Robotics, Fluid Mechanics
Do internships in automobile/manufacturing companies
Clear GATE for PSUs: BHEL, SAIL, NTPC, ONGC
OR join: Tata Motors, Maruti, L&T, Mahindra
Specialize in Robotics, Automation, or EV technology

electrical_engineer.title: Electrical Engineer
electrical_engineer.description: Design and develop electrical systems — power grids, electronics, control systems, and renewable energy.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM and get BTech Electrical/Electronics Engineering
Learn MATLAB, PLC programming, circuit design
Focus on Power Systems, Control Systems, Signal Processing
Do internships at power companies or electronics firms
Clear GATE for PSUs: NTPC, PGCIL, BHEL
OR join: Siemens, ABB, Schneider, Tata Power
Target EV and renewable energy — booming sector

chemical_engineer.title: Chemical Engineer
chemical_engineer.description: Design processes to convert raw materials into useful products in pharmaceuticals, oil, food, and materials industries.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM and get BTech Chemical Engineering
Learn ASPEN Plus, HYSYS (industry standard software)
Focus on Process Design, Thermodynamics, Mass Transfer, Reaction Engineering
Do internships at oil refineries, pharma, food processing firms
Clear GATE for PSUs: IOCL, ONGC, BPCL, GAIL
OR join pharma: Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, TATA Chemicals

architect.title: Architect
architect.description: Design buildings, spaces, and urban environments that are functional, safe, and aesthetically pleasing.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Maths (any stream)
Appear for NATA (National Aptitude Test in Architecture) or JEE Paper 2
Complete 5-year B.Arch degree
Do internships at architecture firms during studies
Register with Council of Architecture (CoA) after graduation
Work at firms or start your own practice
Consider specialization: Interior Design, Urban Planning, Sustainable Architecture

urban_planner.title: Urban Planner
urban_planner.description: Plan and develop land use policies for cities, towns, and regions to create functional, sustainable communities.
roadmap: Clear 12th and get B.Plan from SPA or IIT
Learn GIS (Geographic Information Systems), AutoCAD, urban data tools
Do internships with municipal corporations, Smart City projects
Get MTown Planning or MUP for better roles
Join government: DDA, HUDCO, Smart Cities Mission, RERA
OR join consulting firms: McKinsey Urban, Ernst & Young

nurse.title: Nurse (Staff Nurse / Nursing Officer)
nurse.description: Provide direct patient care, assist doctors, administer medications, and support patient recovery in hospitals and clinics.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB
Appear for AIIMS BSc Nursing, JIPMER, or state nursing entrance exams
Complete 4-year BSc Nursing or 3.5-year GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery)
Register with State Nursing Council
Join government hospitals, AIIMS, private hospitals or nursing homes
Appear for AIIMS / ESIC Nursing Officer exam for central government roles
Option: MSc Nursing for specialization and higher roles
nurse.duration: 4 years BSc Nursing or 3.5 years GNM
cons: Relatively lower pay initially in India

pharmacist.title: Pharmacist
pharmacist.description: Dispense medications, counsel patients on drug usage, ensure drug safety, and work in hospitals, retail, or pharma industry.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB or PCM
Appear for state pharmacy entrance exams or direct admission
Complete 4-year B.Pharm degree
Register with State Pharmacy Council
Work in: hospital pharmacy, retail pharmacy, pharmaceutical companies
OR complete M.Pharm for research / academic / regulatory roles
Option: Appear for Drug Inspector exam (state PSC)
Option: PhD for research in pharma companies like Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin
pros: Pharma industry is huge in India
Drug Inspector is a government role

physiotherapist.title: Physiotherapist
physiotherapist.description: Help patients recover from injuries, surgeries, and chronic conditions through physical exercise and therapy techniques.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB
Appear for state BPT (Bachelor of Physiotherapy) entrance exams
Complete 4.5-year BPT degree including 6-month internship
Register with Indian Association of Physiotherapists (IAP)
Work in hospitals, sports academies, rehab centers, old age homes
OR start own clinic after gaining experience
Do MPT (Master of Physiotherapy) for specialization
cons: Takes time to build own practice

dentist.title: Dentist (BDS / MDS)
dentist.description: Diagnose and treat oral health issues — teeth, gums, jaw problems. Can specialize in orthodontics, oral surgery, etc.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB with good marks
Appear for NEET-UG (dental colleges use NEET scores)
Complete 5-year BDS degree including 1-year internship
Register with Dental Council of India
Start practice or join a dental hospital
Option: Appear for NEET-MDS for specialization (Orthodontics, Implants, Oral Surgery)
Open own clinic after 2-3 years of experience
top_institutes: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences Delhi
Any government dental college via NEET
cons: Takes time to build patient base

veterinarian.title: Veterinarian
veterinarian.description: Diagnose and treat animals — pets, livestock, wildlife. Can work in private clinics, government, zoos, or research.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB
Appear for NEET-UG (used for BVSc admissions in most states)
Complete 5.5-year BVSc & AH degree
Register with Veterinary Council of India
Join private pet clinics, livestock farms, poultry companies, zoos, or government animal husbandry departments
Option: MVSc for research or specialization
Appear for state government Veterinary Officer exam

radiologist.title: Radiologist
radiologist.description: Use imaging technologies (X-ray, MRI, CT scan, ultrasound) to diagnose diseases and guide treatments.
roadmap: Complete MBBS (5.5 years) after clearing NEET-UG
Appear for NEET-PG after internship
Get MD in Radiodiagnosis (3 years)
Train with advanced imaging equipment during MD
Join hospitals or diagnostic centers
Consider DNB Radiology as alternative to MD
Interventional Radiology is the highest paying sub-specialization
radiologist.cost_estimate: Government: 10-20 Lakhs total | Private MBBS: 50L-1 Crore
radiologist.duration: MBBS 5.5 yrs + MD 3 yrs = 8.5 years total

psychologist.title: Psychologist / Counseling Psychologist
psychologist.description: Study and address human behavior, mental health, and emotional wellbeing through therapy, assessment, and research.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BA/BSc in Psychology (3 years)
Complete MA/MSc in Psychology (2 years) — mandatory for practice
Specialize: Clinical, Counseling, Industrial-Organizational, Child Psychology
Register with Rehabilitation Council of India (for clinical roles)
Work in hospitals, schools, corporates, private practice
PhD for research and academic roles
cons: Takes time to build a practice
Licensing is not well-structured in India yet

social_worker.title: Social Worker
social_worker.description: Work with individuals, families, and communities to improve wellbeing, fight poverty, and address social issues.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BSW (Bachelor of Social Work) or any graduation
Complete MSW (Master of Social Work) — 2 years, very important for good roles
Specialize: Child welfare, Community development, Healthcare, HR
Work with NGOs, hospitals, government welfare departments, UN agencies, CSR departments
TISS MSW is gold standard — clear their entrance exam
cons: Field work in difficult conditions sometimes

teacher.title: Teacher / Educator
teacher.description: Educate students at school, college, or university level. Shape future generations through knowledge and mentorship.
roadmap: Complete 12th and any graduation in your subject of interest
Complete B.Ed (Bachelor of Education) — 2 years, mandatory for school teaching
Clear TET (Teacher Eligibility Test) — CTET for central schools, state TET for state schools
Apply to government schools via state teacher recruitment or Kendriya Vidyalaya
OR join private schools directly
For college teaching: complete MA/MSc then clear UGC NET or SLET
PhD mandatory for assistant professor in universities

professor.title: University Professor / Assistant Professor
professor.description: Teach at college/university level, conduct research, publish papers, and guide students in higher education.
roadmap: Complete graduation and post-graduation in your subject
Clear UGC NET exam (mandatory for assistant professor without PhD)
Pursue PhD from a reputed university (5-6 years)
Publish research papers in journals (builds your profile)
Apply for Assistant Professor positions at universities/colleges
Progress through: Assistant Prof → Associate Prof → Full Professor
Apply for international positions or fellowships (Fulbright, DAAD etc.)
professor.cost_estimate: JRF/SRF fellowship during PhD: get paid ~31,000-35,000/month

journalist.title: Journalist / Reporter
journalist.description: Report news, investigate stories, interview people, and communicate information to the public through print, TV, digital, or radio.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BA in Journalism & Mass Communication or BJMC (3 years)
OR any graduation then PG Diploma in Journalism
Do internships at newspapers, TV channels, news portals during college
Build a portfolio of published articles / stories
Join local newspaper/TV as junior reporter
Specialize: political, crime, business, sports, investigative, science journalism
Digital journalism (YouTuber, podcast journalist) also growing fast
top_institutes: IIMC Delhi (Indian Institute of Mass Communication)
journalist.duration: 3 years BJMC or 1-2 years PG Diploma after graduation
cons: Job security concerns in print media

content_writer.title: Content Writer / Copywriter
content_writer.description: Create written content for websites, blogs, ads, social media, emails, and marketing materials.
roadmap: Complete 12th and any graduation (English literature helps)
Start writing — blogs, LinkedIn articles, guest posts
Build a portfolio of 10-15 writing samples
Learn SEO basics (Search Engine Optimization) — very valuable
Learn copywriting (persuasive writing for ads/marketing)
Join content agencies, startups, or go freelance on Fiverr/Upwork
Build a niche: tech writing, finance, health, SaaS, legal content pays best
top_institutes: No specific college — skills matter more
content_writer.duration: 3-6 months to be job-ready with a portfolio

digital_marketer.title: Digital Marketer
digital_marketer.description: Plan and execute online marketing strategies — SEO, social media, email, paid ads, and content marketing.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Learn: SEO, Google Ads, Facebook Ads, Email Marketing, Analytics
Get Google Ads and Google Analytics certifications (free)
Complete HubSpot Digital Marketing certification (free)
Do internships at marketing agencies or startups
Build case studies showing measurable results (traffic growth, ROAS)
Specialize in: Performance Marketing, SEO, Social Media, Email, Affiliate Marketing
digital_marketer.duration: 3-6 months for certifications + 1 year of practice

financial_analyst.title: Financial Analyst
financial_analyst.description: Analyze financial data, evaluate investments, build financial models, and advise businesses and investors on financial decisions.
roadmap: Complete BCom, BBA, or any graduation with strong maths
Learn Excel, Financial Modeling, Valuation techniques
Get CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) — globally respected
OR complete MBA Finance from a good college
Do internships at investment banks, mutual funds, NBFCs
Join: investment banking, equity research, corporate finance, FP&A
NISM certifications for stock market roles
cons: CFA is very tough (global pass rate ~40%)

investment_banker.title: Investment Banker
investment_banker.description: Help companies raise capital through IPOs, mergers, acquisitions, and bond issuances. High pressure, very high rewards.
roadmap: Get strong graduation (BCom, Economics, Engineering)
Target top MBA programs: IIM A/B/C or abroad (HBS, Wharton)
Do finance internships — Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan, Kotak IB etc.
Crack summer internship in IB during MBA = almost guaranteed placement
Join as Analyst → Associate → VP → Director → MD
Build modeling skills: Excel, PowerPoint, Financial Modeling
investment_banker.duration: 3-5 years after graduation to enter IB
pros: Highest paying finance career in India

actuary.title: Actuary
actuary.description: Use maths and statistics to assess financial risk for insurance companies, pension funds, and financial institutions.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCM (strong maths required)
Get BCom/BSc Maths/Statistics or BBA
Register with Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI)
Clear actuarial exams — 15 papers total (can take 5-7 years)
Work as actuarial analyst while clearing exams
Qualified actuary after clearing all 15 papers = Fellow of IAI
Work in: life insurance, general insurance, consulting, pension funds
top_institutes: Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) — official body
Any college with strong maths/stats department
actuary.cost_estimate: Exam fees: 1-3 Lakhs total over years | College: 2-6 Lakhs
actuary.duration: 5-7 years to become fully qualified actuary
entrance_exams: CS1, CS2, CM1 etc. (Core Technical subjects)
pros: One of highest paid professions globally
cons: Very tough exams — 5-7 years to qualify

stock_broker.title: Stock Broker / Equity Dealer
stock_broker.description: Buy and sell stocks, derivatives, and other securities on behalf of clients or proprietary trading desks.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Clear NISM Series VII (Stock Broker) exam — mandatory
Clear NISM Series VIII (Equity Derivatives) exam
Join a brokerage firm as dealer / relationship manager
Alternatively: become a sub-broker under a registered broker
Build client base and AUM (Assets Under Management)
Progress to wealth manager / portfolio manager roles
entrance_exams: NISM Series VII and VIII exams
pros: Earnings can be very high with good clients

management_consultant.title: Management Consultant
management_consultant.description: Help organizations solve business problems, improve performance, and implement strategies across industries.

requirements.min_education: MBA preferred (BTech also accepted at top firms)

roadmap: Get strong graduation: IIT, NIT, or top college (BTech/BCom)
OR do MBA from IIM/ISB
Build analytical and case-solving skills
Practice case interviews: 200+ cases minimum for MBB (McKinsey, BCG, Bain)
Do consulting internships during MBA
Join Big 4 (Deloitte, EY, PWC, KPMG) or MBB firms
Progress: Analyst → Consultant → Manager → Partner
management_consultant.duration: MBA 2 years + 3-5 years to become senior consultant

product_manager.title: Product Manager (PM)
product_manager.description: Define the vision, strategy, and roadmap for a software product. Bridge between tech, design, and business teams.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or any graduation + some tech exposure
Work 2-3 years as software engineer, business analyst, or consultant
Build product sense: study great products, read PM books (Inspired, Cracking PM Interview)
Get certified: AIPMM, or take PM courses on Coursera/Udemy
Apply for APM (Associate PM) programs at Google, Microsoft, Flipkart, Swiggy, Zomato
Progress: APM → PM → Senior PM → Director of Product → CPO
product_manager.duration: 2-4 years of relevant experience to become PM
entrance_exams: No specific exam — APM interviews + portfolio
pros: Highest impact role in tech companies
Very high salary at top companies
Work on products used by millions
cons: Takes years of experience to enter
Ambiguous role — hard to define success

devops_engineer.title: DevOps Engineer
devops_engineer.description: Bridge development and operations — automate deployments, manage cloud infrastructure, ensure systems run reliably at scale.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or learn software engineering basics
Learn Linux command line deeply
Learn: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions)
Learn cloud: AWS (most in demand), Azure, or GCP
Get certified: AWS Solutions Architect, CKA (Kubernetes)
Learn Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Ansible
Apply for DevOps / SRE / Cloud Engineer roles
top_institutes: Self-learning via A Cloud Guru, Linux Foundation

cybersecurity_analyst.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
cybersecurity_analyst.description: Protect organizations from cyber attacks, monitor for threats, conduct penetration testing, and ensure data security.
roadmap: Get BTech CS, BCA, or BSc IT
Learn networking fundamentals (CompTIA Network+)
Learn: Linux, Python scripting, Networking protocols
Get certified: CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker), CompTIA Security+
Practice on: TryHackMe, HackTheBox, PicoCTF platforms
Specialize: Penetration Testing, SOC Analyst, VAPT, Malware Analysis, Cloud Security
Get advanced certs: OSCP (Offensive Security), CISSP

blockchain_developer.title: Blockchain Developer
blockchain_developer.description: Build decentralized applications, smart contracts, and blockchain infrastructure for fintech, supply chain, and Web3 companies.
roadmap: Learn programming: Solidity (for Ethereum), Rust (for Solana)
Understand blockchain fundamentals: consensus mechanisms, wallets, DeFi
Build smart contracts and deploy on testnets (Goerli, Mumbai)
Learn Web3.js, Ethers.js for frontend blockchain interaction
Build 2-3 DApp projects and publish on GitHub
Join hackathons: ETHIndia, Solana Hackathon, Chainlink
Apply at Web3 companies, crypto exchanges, or DeFi protocols

salary.senior: 60 - 1.5 Crore (Protocol engineer at top DeFi project)

entrance_exams: No formal exam — portfolio and hackathon wins matter

game_developer.title: Game Developer
game_developer.description: Design and code video games for mobile, PC, console, or VR platforms.
roadmap: Learn programming: C++ or C# (for Unity)
Learn game engine: Unity (beginner-friendly) or Unreal Engine (AAA games)
Start small: make Pong, Snake, Flappy Bird clones
Learn: Physics engines, Animation, UI/UX for games
Build a portfolio of 3-5 game projects
Publish on Itch.io or Google Play Store
Apply at Indian game studios or go indie
Indian gaming industry is growing: Nazara, Junglee Games, MPL, Dream11
game_developer.cost_estimate: Self-learning: nearly free | Formal course: 2-6 Lakhs
cons: Indian studios pay less vs abroad

app_developer.title: Mobile App Developer
app_developer.description: Build mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms used by millions of people.
roadmap: Learn programming basics: Java or Kotlin for Android | Swift for iOS
OR learn Flutter / React Native for cross-platform (one code, both platforms)
Build 3-5 apps and publish on Play Store / App Store
Learn: APIs, databases (Firebase, SQLite), UI/UX for mobile
Do internships or freelance for experience
Apply at startups, product companies, or go freelance
app_developer.cost_estimate: Google Play Store: Rs 1,750 one-time | App Store: $99/year
app_developer.duration: 6 months - 1 year to be job ready
pros: Publish own apps for passive income
cons: Android and iOS are different ecosystems
App Store approval can be slow

ml_engineer.title: Machine Learning Engineer
ml_engineer.description: Build, train, and deploy machine learning models into production systems used by real applications.
roadmap: Strong foundation in Maths: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Statistics, Probability
Learn Python, NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn
Learn Deep Learning: TensorFlow or PyTorch
Learn model deployment: Flask/FastAPI, Docker, cloud (AWS SageMaker)
Learn MLOps basics: model versioning, monitoring, retraining pipelines
Build end-to-end ML projects on GitHub
Target: research labs, AI startups, or big tech (Google, Microsoft, Amazon)
ml_engineer.cost_estimate: 5-15 Lakhs for college | Certifications nearly free
ml_engineer.duration: BTech 4 years or 1-2 years self-learning after any tech degree

data_analyst.title: Data Analyst
data_analyst.description: Collect, clean, and analyze data to help businesses make better decisions using charts, dashboards, and reports.
roadmap: Complete any graduation — BCom, BSc, BTech all work
Learn Excel (advanced), SQL (mandatory), Python (Pandas/Matplotlib)
Learn Business Intelligence tools: Power BI or Tableau
Build 3-5 portfolio projects analyzing real datasets (Kaggle has free data)
Get Google Data Analytics Certificate (Coursera, free to audit)
Apply at companies in any industry — every company needs analysts

network_engineer.title: Network Engineer
network_engineer.description: Design, implement, and maintain computer networks — LAN, WAN, wireless, and cloud networks for organizations.
roadmap: Get BTech CS/ECE or BCA/BSc IT
Clear CCNA (Cisco Certified Network Associate) — most important certification
Learn: Routing & Switching, Firewalls, VPNs, IP addressing
Progress to CCNP (professional level)
Work at: IT companies, ISPs, corporates, data centers
Specialize in: Network Security, Cloud Networking (SD-WAN), Wireless
cons: Physical network work can be tedious
Cloud is replacing traditional networking slowly

cloud_architect.title: Cloud Architect
cloud_architect.description: Design and oversee cloud computing strategies and infrastructure for organizations migrating to or operating on cloud platforms.
roadmap: Start as software engineer or network/sysadmin with 2-3 years experience
Learn cloud fundamentals: AWS, Azure, or GCP
Get Associate level cert: AWS Solutions Architect Associate
Get Professional level: AWS Solutions Architect Professional
Learn: Microservices, Serverless, Kubernetes, Cost Optimization
Progress from Cloud Engineer → Cloud Architect
cloud_architect.duration: 3-5 years experience to reach architect level

hr_manager.title: HR Manager / Human Resources Professional
hr_manager.description: Manage recruitment, employee relations, training, performance management, and organizational culture in companies.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Get MBA in HR from a good college OR do PG Diploma in HR
Alternatively: PGDHRM from XLRI (highly respected)
Do HR internships at companies during college
Join as HR Executive → HR Generalist → HRBP → HR Manager → CHRO
Specialize: Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development, Compensation & Benefits, HRIS
entrance_exams: XLRI XAT has separate HR program cutoff

supply_chain_manager.title: Supply Chain Manager / Logistics Manager
supply_chain_manager.description: Manage the flow of goods, information, and resources from suppliers to customers efficiently and cost-effectively.
roadmap: Get BTech in any discipline or graduation + MBA in Operations/Supply Chain
Learn: ERP systems (SAP, Oracle), Excel, data analytics
Get APICS CPIM or CSCP certification (globally recognized)
Work in: FMCG, e-commerce, manufacturing, pharma logistics
Companies hiring: Amazon, Flipkart, Maersk, DHL, Tata, Reliance
pros: Core operations role in every company

operations_research_analyst.title: Operations Research Analyst
operations_research_analyst.description: Use mathematical and analytical methods to help organizations make better decisions and improve efficiency.
roadmap: Get BTech IE/CS/Maths or BSc Statistics/Operations Research
Learn: Linear Programming, Simulation, Optimization (Python/R/CPLEX)
Learn data tools: Python (scipy, pulp), Gurobi, Excel Solver
Work in: consulting, airlines (yield management), logistics, manufacturing, finance
MTech in IE or MBA in Operations for senior roles

real_estate_agent.title: Real Estate Agent / Property Consultant
real_estate_agent.description: Help clients buy, sell, or rent properties. Work on commission basis with potential for very high earnings.
roadmap: Complete 12th (any stream)
Get RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority) registration as agent
Join an established real estate firm to learn the trade
Build network of clients, builders, and other agents
Learn property valuation, legal documentation, home loan process
Specialize: residential, commercial, luxury, or rental market
Eventually build own consultancy or join developers like DLF, Godrej Properties
top_institutes: Short courses in real estate management
cons: Income very inconsistent especially early on

insurance_agent.title: Insurance Agent / Financial Advisor
insurance_agent.description: Sell life, health, general insurance policies and investment plans. Help clients protect their financial future.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Clear IRDAI (Insurance Regulatory) licensing exam — mandatory
Join an insurance company as agent: LIC, SBI Life, HDFC Life, Max Life
Complete 50-hour IRDAI approved training
Build client portfolio through referrals and networking
Progress to: Senior Agent → Sales Manager → Branch Manager → Agency Head
insurance_agent.duration: Can start in 2-3 weeks after training

salary.senior: 20 - 50 LPA (Agency head / tied agent with large book)

entrance_exams: IRDAI licensing exam (IC33 for life insurance)
cons: Selling to family and friends awkward initially

hotel_manager.title: Hotel Manager / Hospitality Professional
hotel_manager.description: Manage hotel operations, staff, guest experience, and revenue across departments like F&B, housekeeping, front desk, and events.
roadmap: Clear 12th in any stream
Appear for NCHMCT JEE (National Hotel Management entrance)
Complete 4-year BSc in Hospitality & Hotel Administration
Do industrial training (mandatory during course) at 5-star hotels
Join hotel as management trainee in chosen department
Progress: Executive → Assistant Manager → Manager → GM
Target: Taj, Oberoi, Marriott, Hyatt, ITC Hotels
top_institutes: Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration

chef.title: Chef / Culinary Professional
chef.description: Create, prepare, and present food in restaurants, hotels, or through own ventures. From sous chef to executive chef.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Join culinary institute for Diploma in Culinary Arts (1-2 years) or 4-year BHM
Learn classical cooking techniques, cuisine styles, kitchen management
Start as commis chef → demi chef → chef de partie → sous chef → executive chef
Specialize: Pastry, Continental, Asian, Indian cuisine
Work at 5-star hotels, fine dining restaurants, or open own restaurant

event_manager.title: Event Manager
event_manager.description: Plan, organize, and execute events — corporate conferences, weddings, concerts, product launches, sports events.
roadmap: Complete any graduation — event management diploma is a plus
Do internships at event management companies
Start with small events to build portfolio
Learn: vendor management, budgeting, logistics, marketing
Build network: venues, caterers, decorators, AV companies, artists
Join companies like Wizcraft, Encompass, or start own agency

fashion_designer.title: Fashion Designer
fashion_designer.description: Create clothing, accessories, and footwear. Work for fashion houses, retail brands, or build your own label.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Appear for NIFT entrance exam or NID entrance
Complete 4-year BDes or B.Sc Fashion Design
Do internships at fashion houses, garment exporters, design studios
Build portfolio and look book of your designs
Join brands: Fabindia, Manyavar, Myntra, Nykaa Fashion, or boutiques
Eventually launch own label or sell on Amazon Fashion / Myntra
top_institutes: NIFT Delhi (National Institute of Fashion Technology)

interior_designer.title: Interior Designer
interior_designer.description: Design interior spaces — homes, offices, restaurants, hotels — to be functional, safe, and visually appealing.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BDes in Interior Design or B.Sc Interior Design (3-4 years)
Learn AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, 3Ds Max for design rendering
Do internships at interior design firms, real estate developers
Build a portfolio with projects you have designed
Start with residential clients, graduate to commercial spaces
Build network with contractors, furniture vendors, real estate agents
pros: India's real estate boom = high demand

animation_artist.title: Animation Artist / VFX Artist
animation_artist.description: Create animated films, TV shows, video game art, VFX for movies, and motion graphics for advertising and social media.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BDes / B.Sc in Animation or join a good animation institute
Learn: Maya, Blender (3D), Adobe After Effects (VFX), Photoshop, Illustrator
Build a demo reel of your best animation work
Do internships at animation studios, ad agencies, gaming companies
Join: Prime Focus World, DNEG, Prana Studios, Technicolor, or game studios

photographer.title: Photographer / Videographer
photographer.description: Capture images and videos for weddings, events, journalism, advertising, wildlife, or fashion.
roadmap: Learn camera basics: exposure triangle, lighting, composition
Get a DSLR/Mirrorless camera (Sony, Canon, Nikon)
Practice every day — shoot everything
Build a portfolio website (Adobe Portfolio, Behance)
Specialize: Wedding, Fashion, Wildlife, Journalism, Advertising, Real Estate
Get clients via Instagram and referrals
Sell photos on Shutterstock, Getty Images for passive income

actor.title: Actor / Performer
actor.description: Perform in films, TV shows, web series, theatre, or OTT platforms. One of India's most glamorous but uncertain careers.
roadmap: Take formal acting training: join a theatre group or acting school
Train in: acting techniques (Stanislavski, Meisner), voice, dance, movement
Do theatre shows to build stage presence
Attend auditions for short films, TV serials, OTT projects
Build a showreel of your best performances
Get a manager / agent after you have credits
Network in film industry hubs: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata
top_institutes: Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) Pune

salary.fresher: Very variable — from 0 to lakhs per project

musician.title: Musician / Music Producer
musician.description: Create, perform, and produce music for albums, films, ads, YouTube, or live concerts.
roadmap: Learn an instrument: guitar, piano, drums, or vocals
Join a music school or take online lessons (Carnatica, Furtados)
Learn music theory and production: FL Studio, Ableton Live, Logic Pro
Create original music and post on Spotify, YouTube, SoundCloud
Perform at local events, colleges, open mics to build audience
Collaborate with other artists and producers
Target: Bollywood music industry, indie music, brand jingles, background scores
musician.duration: Ongoing learning — can start performing in 1-2 years

salary.senior: 1 Crore+ (top composers like Pritam, Amit Trivedi)

entrance_exams: No formal entrance for most — audition based
pros: Platforms like Spotify and YouTube democratize reach

sports_professional.title: Professional Sportsperson
sports_professional.description: Compete professionally in sports — cricket, football, badminton, chess, tennis, athletics, kabaddi, etc.
roadmap: Identify your sport early (ideally before age 12-14 for most sports)
Join a sports academy or get a dedicated coach
Participate in district → state → national level competitions
Get support from SAI (Sports Authority of India) programs
For cricket: play district cricket → IPL trials → Ranji Trophy → India team
For Olympic sports: target national championship → Asian Games → Olympics
Get sponsorships as you build national profile
sports_professional.duration: Ongoing from early age — typically 10+ years to professional level

salary.mid_level: IPL: 20 Lakhs - 20 Crore per season | Other sports vary widely
salary.senior: Crores through contracts, endorsements, prize money

pros: National pride and fame if successful
IPL and endorsements are very lucrative
Government job quota for sports persons
cons: Requires extreme dedication from young age
Most earn very little outside top tier

sports_coach.title: Sports Coach / Physical Education Teacher
sports_coach.description: Train athletes and sports teams, or teach physical education in schools and colleges.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get B.P.Ed (1-2 years after graduation) or 4-year BPEd integrated
Get coaching certifications from sports federation (BCCI, BAI, AFI, etc.)
Start as assistant coach at schools, clubs, academies
Build track record of athlete performances under your coaching
Apply for government school PE teacher posts via state recruitment
Progress to head coach, national level coach
top_institutes: LNIPE Gwalior (Lakshmibai National Institute of Physical Education)
Netaji Subhas National Institute of Sports Patiala
pros: Government school PE teacher is stable

fitness_trainer.title: Fitness Trainer / Personal Trainer
fitness_trainer.description: Design workout programs and train individuals or groups to achieve health and fitness goals.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get certified: ACSM, ACE, ISSA, or K11 (India-based) personal training cert
Intern at a gym to gain practical experience
Build client base: start with friends/family and expand via social media
Create fitness content on Instagram/YouTube to attract online clients
Open own gym or do online training
Specialize: weight loss, bodybuilding, sports performance, nutrition
top_institutes: K11 Academy of Fitness Sciences India

nutritionist.title: Nutritionist / Dietitian
nutritionist.description: Advise individuals, hospitals, sports teams, and corporates on food, diet, and nutrition for health and wellness.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Biology & Chemistry
Get BSc in Nutrition, Dietetics, or Food Science (3-4 years)
Complete MSc for clinical and hospital roles
Get RD (Registered Dietitian) certification from IDA (Indian Dietetic Association)
Work in: hospitals, corporate wellness, sports nutrition, private practice
Build online presence for private consulting via Instagram/YouTube

yoga_instructor.title: Yoga Instructor / Wellness Coach
yoga_instructor.description: Teach yoga, meditation, and mindfulness to individuals, groups, studios, or online audiences worldwide.
roadmap: Practice yoga consistently yourself for 1-2 years
Complete 200-hour Yoga Teacher Training (YTT) — globally recognized
Get 300-hour advanced YTT for better credentials
Register with Yoga Alliance (USA) for international recognition
Teach at: yoga studios, gyms, schools, corporates, online (Zoom/YouTube)
Build Instagram and YouTube audience for online revenue
Partner with wellness apps or retreats
top_institutes: Morarji Desai National Institute of Yoga, Delhi

pilot_air_traffic_controller.title: Air Traffic Controller (ATC)
pilot_air_traffic_controller.description: Manage and direct aircraft in the air and on the ground to ensure safe and efficient movement at airports.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Physics & Maths (60%+)
Appear for AAI (Airports Authority of India) Junior Executive (ATC) exam
Pass written exam + medical + interview
Get selected and join AAI training at CATC Allahabad or NIAMAR Delhi
Complete 2-year training in radar, communications, air law
Work as assistant ATC controller and progress to senior positions
top_institutes: NIAMAR Delhi (National Institute of Aviation Management and Research)
pilot_air_traffic_controller.cost_estimate: Government funded — get salary during training

marine_engineer.title: Marine Engineer
marine_engineer.description: Maintain and operate engines and machinery on ships, tankers, and offshore platforms. Travel the world on sea.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with 60%+
Appear for IMU CET (Indian Maritime University Common Entrance Test)
Complete 4-year B.E Marine Engineering at IMU or affiliated colleges
Complete on-board training (sea time) — mandatory
Clear MEO (Marine Engineering Officer) CoC exams from MMD
Join as 4th Engineer on a ship → 3rd → 2nd → Chief Engineer
pros: Very high salary especially Chief Engineer
Tax-free income for time at sea
cons: Long months away from family (6-9 months on ship)

merchant_navy.title: Merchant Navy Officer (Nautical)
merchant_navy.description: Navigate and command cargo ships, tankers, and container vessels as a deck officer or captain.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with 60%+ and English
Appear for IMU CET
Complete 3-year BSc Nautical Science or Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS 1 year)
Complete pre-sea training and STCW certification
Join a shipping company as deck cadet
Clear MMD CoC exams: Officer of Watch → 2nd Officer → Chief Officer → Master/Captain
merchant_navy.duration: 3 years + sea training to get first officer role
pros: Captain is one of best-paid professions

geologist.title: Geologist / Geoscientist
geologist.description: Study the Earth's structure, rocks, minerals, and history. Work in oil & gas, mining, disaster management, or research.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCM or PCB
Get BSc in Geology (3 years)
Complete MSc Geology — mandatory for good jobs (2 years)
Clear UPSC Geologist exam or state geological survey exams
Join GSI (Geological Survey of India), ONGC, Coal India, or DRDO
Field work training is essential — learn GIS, remote sensing
PhD for research or academic roles
pros: Oil & gas sector pays extremely well

environmental_scientist.title: Environmental Scientist
environmental_scientist.description: Study and protect the environment — analyze pollution, assess environmental impact, develop sustainability solutions.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCM or PCB
Get BSc Environmental Science or BTech Environmental Engineering
Complete MSc Environmental Science or MBA Sustainability
Get certified: ISO 14001 Lead Auditor, EIA consultant certification
Work in: pollution control boards, EIA consulting, NGOs, green companies
Government jobs: CPCB (Central Pollution Control Board), state PCBs
pros: ESG consulting is new booming niche
cons: Low awareness = limited opportunities in India currently

astronomer.title: Astronomer / Astrophysicist
astronomer.description: Study the universe — stars, galaxies, black holes, exoplanets. Work at observatories, universities, or space agencies.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with very high marks (90%+)
Get BSc in Physics or Maths from a top university
Clear JAM (Joint Admission to MSc) for IIT MSc Physics
Complete MSc Physics or MSc Astronomy
Clear JEST or CSIR-NET for PhD admission
Do PhD at IISc, IIA, TIFR, IUCAA or abroad
Join ISRO, IUCAA Pune, IIA Bangalore, TIFR Mumbai as researcher
astronomer.cost_estimate: 1-5 Lakhs + JRF fellowship during PhD (fully funded)
astronomer.duration: BSc 3 yrs + MSc 2 yrs + PhD 5 yrs = ~10 years

biologist.title: Biologist / Life Scientist
biologist.description: Study living organisms — genetics, ecology, molecular biology, microbiology. Work in research, pharma, biotech, or teaching.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB
Get BSc Biology / Biotechnology / Microbiology (3 years)
Complete MSc in specialization: Genetics, Molecular Biology, Microbiology, Ecology
Clear CSIR-NET JRF for PhD fellowship (paid)
PhD at NCBS, TIFR, CCMB, IISc or IITs
Work in: pharma research, biotech startups, teaching, conservation organizations
biologist.duration: BSc 3 + MSc 2 + PhD 5 = 10 years for research career
cons: PhD is nearly mandatory for research

psychologist_industrial.title: Industrial/Organizational Psychologist
psychologist_industrial.description: Apply psychological principles to workplace settings — employee motivation, hiring assessments, organizational culture, and leadership development.
roadmap: Complete BA/BSc Psychology (3 years)
Complete MA/MSc Industrial-Organizational Psychology or MBA HR with Psychology focus
Do corporate internships in talent assessment, L&D, OD roles
Work in: HR consulting, talent assessment firms like SHL, Mettl, Hogan
Join companies as OD consultant, L&D manager, talent analytics partner
TISS MSc OB (Organizational Behavior) is gold standard in India

patent_attorney.title: Patent Attorney / IP Lawyer
patent_attorney.description: Help inventors and companies protect their intellectual property through patents, trademarks, and copyrights.
roadmap: Get a technical degree: BTech CS, Biotech, Chemical Engineering, or any science degree
Complete LLB (3 years after BTech) or BA LLB (5 years after 12th)
Clear Indian Patent Agent Exam conducted by Patent Office
Register as Patent Agent with Indian Patent Office
Work at IP law firms (Anand and Anand, Remfry & Sagar) or corporate IP departments
Build specialization in tech patents, pharma patents, or design patents
patent_attorney.cost_estimate: LLB: 3-10 Lakhs | Patent Agent exam: 1000 Rs
pros: Tech + law combination is unique and powerful
cons: Both technical and legal knowledge needed

company_secretary.title: Company Secretary (CS)
company_secretary.description: Ensure companies comply with legal and statutory requirements, advise boards on governance, and manage corporate affairs.
roadmap: Register for CS Foundation after 12th (or directly CS Executive after graduation)
Clear CS Foundation (4 papers)
Clear CS Executive Programme (2 modules, 8 papers)
Complete CS Professional Programme (3 modules, 9 papers)
Complete 1-year practical training under a practicing CS or in company
Become Associate Member of ICSI
Work as CS in companies, practice independently, or join law firms
top_institutes: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) — official body

salary.senior: 25 - 60 LPA (CS of listed company / own practice)

pros: Mandatory role in all listed companies
cons: Salary growth is slower than CA

tax_consultant.title: Tax Consultant / GST Practitioner
tax_consultant.description: Advise individuals and businesses on income tax, GST filing, tax planning, and compliance with tax laws.
roadmap: Complete BCom or any graduation with commerce background
Clear CA Foundation + CA Intermediate (Article training gives practical tax experience)
Get GST Practitioner certificate from GSTN portal
OR get Tax Consultant certificate from ICAI
Start practice by handling ITR filing, GST returns for small businesses
Build client base via referrals and local business community networking
CA qualification significantly boosts tax consulting career
top_institutes: Short tax consultant courses by NIIT, Tally etc.

salary.senior: 25 - 80 LPA (big firm tax partner / high net worth clients)

pros: Own practice possible with few clients

police_officer.title: Police Officer (IPS / State Police)
police_officer.description: Maintain law and order, investigate crimes, and serve the community. From constable to IPS officer.

requirements.min_education: Graduation for IPS | 12th for SI | 10th for Constable

roadmap: Route 1 - IPS: Clear UPSC CSE exam, get IPS allocation based on rank
Route 2 - Sub Inspector (SI): Clear state police SI recruitment exam + physical test
Route 3 - Constable: Clear state constable recruitment exam + physical test
Complete police training at respective academies
For IPS: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA) Hyderabad
Progress based on seniority and merit: Constable → SI → Inspector → DSP → SP → DIG → IG → DGP
police_officer.cost_estimate: Funded training — you get salary during training
cons: Risk to life in conflict areas

fire_officer.title: Fire Officer / Firefighter
fire_officer.description: Respond to fire emergencies, rescue operations, and disaster management. Work in fire departments or industrial safety.

requirements.medical: Strict physical fitness — height, weight, lung capacity, vision

roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Clear state/municipal fire department recruitment exam
Pass physical fitness test (running, climbing, lifting)
Complete fire training academy (1-2 years)
Join as Fireman → Leading Fireman → Sub Officer → Station Officer → CFO
Industrial fire officer route: get NEBOSH/IOSH safety certifications for better-paying roles
cons: Lower salary in municipal fire department

customs_officer.title: Customs Officer / IRS Officer
customs_officer.description: Manage import-export customs, prevent smuggling, collect customs duties, and regulate international trade.
roadmap: Complete any graduation from a recognized university
Clear UPSC CSE exam and get IRS (Customs & Indirect Taxes) allocation based on rank
OR clear SSC CGL exam for Inspector (Central Excise/Customs) — easier entry point
Complete training at NACIN (National Academy of Customs, Indirect Taxes and Narcotics)
Work at ports, airports, ICDs (Inland Container Depots), border checkpoints
top_institutes: LBSNAA for IRS officers (jointly with IAS)
pros: Posted at airports and ports — interesting work
cons: Corruption temptations that must be avoided

income_tax_officer.title: Income Tax Officer / IRS (IT) Officer
income_tax_officer.description: Investigate income tax evasion, conduct raids, assess tax returns, and help government collect revenue.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Prepare for UPSC CSE for IRS (Income Tax) allocation — needs top 100-200 rank typically
OR clear SSC CGL for Income Tax Inspector (Group C) — much easier
Clear SSC CGL written exam + skill test + document verification
Complete training at NADT (National Academy of Direct Taxes) Nagpur
Work as assessing officer, TDS officer, investigation wing
top_institutes: NADT Nagpur (National Academy of Direct Taxes)
cons: Transfers away from home state possible

bank_po.title: Bank PO / Banking Officer
bank_po.description: Work as a Probationary Officer in public sector banks — manage accounts, loans, customer service, and bank operations.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Prepare for IBPS PO / SBI PO exams — most popular banking entry exams
Clear Prelims (Quantitative, Reasoning, English) + Mains + Interview
Join as Probationary Officer (PO) in designated bank
Complete 2-year probation period
Progress: PO → Officer → Manager → AGM → DGM → GM → ED → CMD
alternatives_if_fail: SSC CGL for central government job

rbi_officer.title: RBI Grade B Officer
rbi_officer.description: Work at the Reserve Bank of India — the central bank of India. One of the most prestigious banking jobs.
roadmap: Complete graduation with 60%+ marks
Prepare extensively: Economics, Finance, Management, English, Reasoning, Quant
Clear RBI Grade B Phase 1 (objective) + Phase 2 (descriptive: Economics, English, Finance) + Interview
The exam is considered one of the toughest government exams after UPSC
Join as Grade B Officer in General/DEPR/DSIM streams
Progress: Grade B → Grade C → Grade D → Chief General Manager → ED → Deputy Governor
top_institutes: Self-study + Plutus IAS / Byju's Exam Prep (RBI specific coaching)
entrance_exams: RBI Grade B Phase 1 and Phase 2
pros: Work on monetary policy of India
cons: Economics knowledge at deep level needed

sebi_officer.title: SEBI Officer (Grade A)
sebi_officer.description: Work at Securities and Exchange Board of India — regulate stock markets, protect investors, and develop the capital markets.
roadmap: Complete graduation — Law, CA, MBA Finance, Economics, Engineering all eligible
Prepare: Securities law, Company law, Economics, Finance, Reasoning
Clear SEBI Grade A Phase 1 (objective) + Phase 2 (descriptive) + Interview
Join as Officer Grade A in General/Legal/IT/Research/Official Language streams
Work on market regulation, investor grievances, policy making, inspection of companies
top_institutes: Self-study + specific SEBI exam coaching modules
pros: Work on IPOs, insider trading cases
Good work-life balance vs private sector

forest_officer.title: Indian Forest Service (IFS) Officer
forest_officer.description: Manage and conserve India's forests, wildlife, and natural resources as part of All India Services through UPSC.
roadmap: Clear 12th and get graduation in: Botany, Zoology, Forestry, Agriculture, Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Statistics, or Engineering
Clear UPSC IFS exam (separate from CSE) — Written exam has science subjects
Clear Personality Test/Interview
Join National Academy of Forest Management (NAOFM) or Indira Gandhi National Forest Academy
Work as: Deputy Conservator of Forests → Conservator → Chief Conservator → Principal Chief Conservator
top_institutes: Indira Gandhi National Forest Academy, Dehradun (IFS training)

railway_officer.title: Indian Railways Officer (IRMS / RRB ALP/JE)
railway_officer.description: Work in Indian Railways — one of the world's largest employers — in technical, management, or operational roles.

requirements.min_education: BTech/Diploma for technical | Graduation for management | 10th for group D

roadmap: Route 1 (IRMS): Clear UPSC CSE and get IRMS (Indian Railway Management Service) allocation
Route 2 (Junior Engineer): Clear RRB JE exam with BTech/Diploma
Route 3 (ALP): Clear RRB ALP (Assistant Loco Pilot) exam after 10th+ITI
Route 4 (Group D): Clear RRB Group D exam after 10th
Complete training at Zonal Railway Training Institutes
railway_officer.duration: Training varies by post: 6 months - 2 years
cons: Group D/ALP roles are physically demanding

diplomat.title: Diplomat / Indian Foreign Service (IFS) Officer
diplomat.description: Represent India abroad as an ambassador or diplomat, manage bilateral relations, protect Indian interests, and assist Indian citizens overseas.
roadmap: Complete any graduation from a recognized university
Start preparing for UPSC CSE exam — IFS allocation given to top rankers
Score very high in UPSC (usually top 30-50 rank) to get IFS allocation
Learn 2 foreign languages (mandatory during training)
Complete training at FSI (Foreign Service Institute) New Delhi
Get posted at Indian Embassies, High Commissions, Consulates abroad
Progress: Third Secretary → Second Secretary → First Secretary → Counsellor → Minister → Ambassador

salary.mid_level: 1-2 LPM + country-specific allowances (doubles in rich countries)

alternatives_if_fail: Ministry of External Affairs non-IFS staff
entrance_exams: UPSC CSE (very high rank needed for IFS)
cons: Frequent international postings away from family
Some postings are in difficult countries

statistician.title: Statistician / Data Statistician
statistician.description: Collect, analyze, and interpret numerical data to solve problems in government, business, health, or research.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCM
Get BSc Statistics or BSc Maths with Statistics (3 years)
Complete MSc Statistics from IIT/ISI/IGIDR (2 years)
Clear ISI admission test or JAM for top institutes
Clear CSS (Combined Statistical Services) exam for government roles
Work at: CSO, NSSO, RBI, SEBI, research institutes, pharma, tech companies
R and Python are essential tools to learn
top_institutes: ISI Kolkata/Delhi (Indian Statistical Institute — top in Asia)
cons: MSc almost mandatory for good roles

economist.title: Economist
economist.description: Study economic systems, analyze data on markets, employment, trade, and policy to guide business and government decisions.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Maths (Commerce or Science)
Get BA or BSc Economics from a top college
Complete MA/MSc Economics — Delhi School of Economics, IGIDR, JNU are top
Clear IGIDR/DSE/ISI entrance exams for top MA programs
PhD from a good university for research or academic roles
OR MBA from IIM for applied economics in consulting/finance
Work at: RBI, World Bank, IMF, NITI Aayog, McKinsey, think tanks
economist.cost_estimate: 1-8 Lakhs | JRF fellowship during PhD is paid
economist.duration: BA 3 years + MA 2 years + optional PhD 5 years
pros: World Bank and IMF hire Indian economists
NITI Aayog and RBI pay well
IES is a prestigious government service
cons: PhD almost needed for top research roles
Private sector values MBA more than MA Eco

biotechnologist.title: Biotechnologist
biotechnologist.description: Apply biological systems and living organisms to develop products in medicine, agriculture, food, and environment.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB or PCMB
Get BSc or BTech in Biotechnology (3-4 years)
Complete MSc Biotechnology or MTech for research career
Clear GATE Biotechnology for government PSU or MTech admission
Join biotech companies: Biocon, Serum Institute, Bharat Biotech, Panacea Biotec
OR PhD at IISc, IITs, CCMB for research in CRISPR, vaccines, bioinformatics

salary.senior: 25 - 60 LPA (senior scientist / CTO of biotech startup)

cons: Lab salaries can be low initially

agricultural_scientist.title: Agricultural Scientist / Agri Officer
agricultural_scientist.description: Research and develop better farming techniques, crop varieties, pest control, and soil management to improve food production.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Biology and Chemistry
Clear ICAR AIEEA (entrance exam) or state agriculture university entrance
Complete 4-year BSc Agriculture
Complete MSc Agriculture for research/teaching roles
Clear ARS (Agricultural Research Service) exam by ICAR for government scientist roles
Join: ICAR institutes, SAUs (State Agriculture Universities), Agribusiness companies, Government Agriculture Departments

food_technologist.title: Food Technologist / Food Scientist
food_technologist.description: Develop, improve, and ensure safety of food products for FMCG companies, food startups, and regulatory bodies.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB or PCM
Get BSc/BTech in Food Technology or Food Science (3-4 years)
Do internships at food companies: Nestle, ITC, Britannia, Amul, Haldiram's
Complete MSc Food Technology for R&D roles
Get FSSAI Food Analyst certification for regulatory roles
Work in: quality control, R&D, food safety, new product development
top_institutes: CFTRI Mysore (Central Food Technological Research Institute)
pros: FSSAI Food Analyst is government role
cons: Quality control work can be repetitive

radiographer.title: Radiographer / Medical Imaging Technician
radiographer.description: Operate medical imaging equipment — X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound machines — to assist doctors in diagnosis.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB or PCM
Complete BSc Radiology or BMRIT (Bachelor of Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology) — 3 years
Get radiation safety training
Work in hospitals, diagnostic centers, radiology clinics
Specialize in CT scanning, MRI, mammography, nuclear medicine
Get certification in advanced modalities for salary boost

speech_therapist.title: Speech-Language Pathologist / Speech Therapist
speech_therapist.description: Diagnose and treat communication disorders — stuttering, voice problems, swallowing disorders, and language delays in children and adults.

requirements.min_education: BASLP (Bachelor of Audiology Speech Language Pathology)

roadmap: Clear 12th with Biology and good English
Clear AIISH entrance or other university entrance exams for BASLP
Complete 4-year BASLP degree
Register with Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI)
Work in hospitals, schools (for children with learning disabilities), rehabilitation centers, private practice
MSc SLP for advanced clinical or academic roles
top_institutes: AIISH Mysore (All India Institute of Speech & Hearing)

optometrist.title: Optometrist / Vision Care Specialist
optometrist.description: Examine eyes for vision problems, prescribe corrective lenses, and detect early signs of eye diseases.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB or PCM
Complete B.Optom degree (4 years) from a recognized college
Register with state optometry council
Work in: eye hospitals, optical chains (Lenskart, Lawrence & Mayo, Titan Eye+), clinics
Join ophthalmology hospitals: Sankara Nethralaya, LV Prasad, Aravind Eye Hospital
M.Optom for academic or specialized clinical roles
pros: Lenskart and optical chains are booming
Digital eye strain creating massive demand
cons: Often confused with ophthalmologist (who is a doctor)

occupational_therapist.title: Occupational Therapist
occupational_therapist.description: Help people with physical, developmental, or mental health conditions regain or develop daily living and working skills.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Biology
Complete 4.5-year BOT degree (includes 6-month internship)
Register with Rehabilitation Council of India
Work in hospitals, schools, rehab centers, mental health facilities, pediatric centers
Specialize: Pediatric OT, Psychiatric OT, Hand Therapy, Geriatric OT
MOT (Masters) for specialization and higher roles
top_institutes: Government Medical Colleges with OT programs
pros: Autism and pediatric OT is booming

lab_technician.title: Medical Lab Technician / DMLT
lab_technician.description: Perform diagnostic tests in medical labs — blood tests, culture tests, urine analysis — to help doctors diagnose diseases.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Biology and Chemistry
Complete DMLT (Diploma in Medical Lab Technology) — 2 years
OR complete B.MLT (Bachelor of Medical Lab Technology) — 3 years for better roles
Get clinical training in hospitals or diagnostic labs (mandatory)
Work at hospitals, diagnostic chains (Dr. Lal PathLabs, SRL, Thyrocare), blood banks
Specialize in microbiology, hematology, biochemistry labs
top_institutes: Any government medical college with MLT program

web_developer.title: Web Developer (Full Stack)
web_developer.description: Build and maintain websites and web applications — handling both frontend (UI) and backend (server, database) development.

requirements.min_education: BTech CS / BCA / BSc IT or self-taught

roadmap: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript — the foundation of all web dev
Learn a frontend framework: React.js (most in demand) or Vue.js
Learn backend: Node.js + Express.js or Python (Django/Flask)
Learn databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Learn version control: Git and GitHub (mandatory)
Build 3-5 full projects and deploy them online (Vercel, Netlify, Heroku)
Apply for jobs or freelance on Upwork, Toptal, Fiverr
top_institutes: Full Stack Open (University of Helsinki, free)
Udemy Web Dev Bootcamp (paid but cheap)
web_developer.cost_estimate: Nearly free via open source learning
web_developer.duration: 6 months - 1 year to be job ready

salary.senior: 35 - 80 LPA (full stack lead at startup/product company)

entrance_exams: No formal exam — portfolio and GitHub matter
cons: Field changes fast — must keep learning
Tutorial hell (learning without building) is a trap
Competitive job market at junior level

technical_writer.title: Technical Writer
technical_writer.description: Create documentation for software, APIs, hardware, medical devices, or industrial equipment — user manuals, help guides, API docs.
roadmap: Get any graduation — BTech or English Literature both work
Learn to write clearly: practice simplifying complex topics
Learn basic HTML/CSS and Markdown (for docs)
Get familiar with tools: Confluence, JIRA, Madcap Flare, GitHub
Build portfolio of technical writing samples (can be self-made)
Apply at: tech companies, software firms, pharma, defense companies that need docs
Google's Season of Docs program is great for portfolio building
top_institutes: Self-learning via Google's Technical Writing courses (free)
technical_writer.duration: 3-6 months to be job ready with portfolio
entrance_exams: No formal exam — writing test during interview
cons: Subject matter experts sometimes dismiss docs

ethical_hacker.title: Ethical Hacker / Penetration Tester
ethical_hacker.description: Legally hack into systems and networks to find vulnerabilities before malicious hackers do — hired by companies to test their security.
roadmap: Learn networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP)
Learn Linux deeply (Kali Linux is hacker's OS)
Learn Python and Bash scripting for automation
Get CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) certification from EC-Council
Practice on: TryHackMe, HackTheBox, PicoCTF, VulnHub
Get OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional) — industry gold standard
Work in: bug bounty programs (earn from home), pentesting firms, corporate red teams
Indian bug bounty platforms: Bugcrowd, HackerOne pay in USD
pros: Bug bounties can earn lakhs from home
cons: Legally sensitive — must only hack with permission
Requires constant learning of new exploits

ai_researcher.title: AI Researcher
ai_researcher.description: Conduct cutting-edge research to advance artificial intelligence — publishing papers, developing new algorithms, and pushing AI boundaries.
roadmap: Get exceptional BTech CS grades from IIT/NIT/IIIT
Learn: Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, NLP, Computer Vision deeply
Read and reproduce papers from ArXiv, NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR
Publish research as an undergrad (very valuable)
Do research internships: Google Brain, Microsoft Research, Samsung Research, TIFR
Get MTech or PhD from top institute or do MS/PhD abroad (Stanford, MIT, CMU)
Join research labs: DeepMind, OpenAI, Google Brain, or start AI company
ai_researcher.cost_estimate: PhD is usually fully funded with stipend ($25,000-40,000/year abroad)
pros: Cutting edge — work that changes the world
cons: Research can take years with no result
PhD stipend is low in India

robotics_engineer.title: Robotics Engineer
robotics_engineer.description: Design, build, and program robots for manufacturing, healthcare, defense, space, and consumer applications.
roadmap: Get BTech in Robotics, Mechatronics, Mechanical, ECE, or CS
Learn: ROS (Robot Operating System), Python, C++, MATLAB
Understand: Control systems, Kinematics, Sensors, Actuators
Build hardware projects: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, robotic arms
Do internships at ISRO, DRDO, robotics startups (GreyOrange, Addverb, Asimov Robotics)
Get MTech in Robotics from IIT for research/senior roles
Consider: agricultural robotics, surgical robotics, warehouse robotics — all growing
cons: Less known in India vs software

embedded_systems_engineer.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
embedded_systems_engineer.description: Develop software for microcontrollers and embedded hardware — from car ECUs to IoT devices to medical devices.
roadmap: Get BTech in ECE, EEE, or CS
Learn C and C++ programming (critical for embedded)
Learn microcontrollers: Arduino → STM32 → ARM Cortex
Understand: RTOS (FreeRTOS), device drivers, memory management
Learn communication protocols: UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, Bluetooth, WiFi
Do projects: build IoT device, smart sensor system, or motor controller
Apply at: automotive (Bosch, Continental), semiconductor (Qualcomm, TI), IoT startups
pros: EV sector needs embedded engineers badly
cons: Niche skills take time to learn

vlsi_engineer.title: VLSI Engineer / Chip Design Engineer
vlsi_engineer.description: Design the integrated circuits (chips) that power all modern electronics — from smartphones to satellites.
roadmap: Get BTech ECE or EEE
Learn Verilog or VHDL (hardware description languages)
Understand digital circuits, CMOS design, timing analysis
Learn tools: Cadence Virtuoso, Synopsys Design Compiler, Mentor Graphics
Do VLSI courses: NPTEL, Udemy, Maven Silicon
Get MTech in VLSI from IITs/NITs for better placement
Join chip companies: Qualcomm, Intel, AMD, NVIDIA, Texas Instruments, MediaTek (all have India offices)
Indian fabs: ISRO SAC, DRDO, C-DAC, SCL Chandigarh (government)
pros: NVIDIA/Qualcomm pay crores at senior level
Future of all technology depends on chips

iot_engineer.title: IoT Engineer (Internet of Things)
iot_engineer.description: Build connected devices and systems that collect data and automate processes — from smart homes to industrial automation.
roadmap: Get BTech CS, ECE, or learn independently
Learn: Python, C/C++ (for microcontrollers)
Learn hardware: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32
Learn cloud IoT platforms: AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub, Google Cloud IoT
Learn communication: MQTT, HTTP, Zigbee, LoRa, Bluetooth
Build smart device projects: smart irrigation, home automation, wearable
Apply at IoT startups or large companies like Siemens, Honeywell, Bosch, Tata Consultancy
entrance_exams: No specific exam — project portfolio matters
pros: India National IoT policy driving demand
cons: Both hardware and software knowledge needed

art_director.title: Art Director / Creative Director
art_director.description: Lead the visual direction of brands, films, advertising campaigns, magazines, or digital media.
roadmap: Get BDes from NID/NIFT or BA Fine Arts
Build strong portfolio across multiple visual styles
Start as graphic designer or junior art director at an ad agency
Learn: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere)
Work up through: Senior Designer → Art Director → Senior AD → Creative Director
Join agencies: Ogilvy, Leo Burnett, DDB Mudra, McCann, BBDO India
Film industry: set design, production design at OTT platforms
art_director.duration: 4 years BDes + 5 years to reach AD level
pros: Bollywood and OTT creating demand for creative directors
cons: Takes many years to reach AD level

animator_3d.title: 3D Animator / Character Animator
animator_3d.description: Create character animations for films, video games, advertising, and architectural visualization.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Join animation course: 3-4 year BDes or 1-2 year advanced diploma
Learn: Maya (industry standard), Blender (free), motion capture basics
Understand: 12 principles of animation, rigging, rendering
Build a demo reel (showreel) — this gets you hired, not your degree
Join animation studios, game companies, ad agencies, or work remotely for international clients
India studios: Prana Studios, DQ Entertainment, Paprikaas
pros: OTT boom — demand for animated content
Prana Studios works on Hollywood films
cons: Frame by frame work is tedious
Indian studios pay less than international

video_editor.title: Video Editor / Post Production Editor
video_editor.description: Edit video footage for films, YouTube, OTT platforms, ads, corporate videos, and news channels.

requirements.min_education: Any graduation / Diploma in Video Editing

roadmap: Learn editing software: Adobe Premiere Pro (most used), DaVinci Resolve (free), Final Cut Pro (Mac)
Learn color grading, audio mixing basics, motion graphics (After Effects)
Practice by editing your own footage, YouTube videos, short films
Build a portfolio / showreel of your best edits
Freelance on Fiverr/Upwork or join production companies
Specialize: film editing, YouTube editing, corporate video, ad films, news editing
top_institutes: Self-learning via YouTube is completely valid
video_editor.cost_estimate: Software: DaVinci Resolve is free | Courses: 50K-3 Lakhs
entrance_exams: No formal exam for most paths

social_media_manager.title: Social Media Manager
social_media_manager.description: Build and manage brand presence on Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, and other platforms through content strategy and community management.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Learn: Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Ads, Google Analytics, Canva, Hootsuite/Buffer
Get HubSpot Social Media Certification (free) and Meta Blueprint certifications
Manage social media for small businesses or NGOs to gain experience
Build your own social presence as a case study
Join marketing agencies, startups, or large brands as social media executive
Specialize: paid social ads, influencer marketing, community management, analytics
cons: Always on — social media never stops

pr_professional.title: Public Relations (PR) Professional
pr_professional.description: Manage the public image and reputation of individuals, brands, and organizations through media relations, crisis management, and communications.
roadmap: Complete 12th and get BA in Mass Communication, BJMC, or any graduation
Get MBA in Marketing or Mass Communication for faster growth
Do internships at PR agencies: Adfactors, Edelman, Genesis BCW, Ogilvy PR
Build media contacts (journalists, influencers, editors)
Join: PR agencies, corporate communications dept, political campaigns, celebrity management
Specialize: corporate PR, crisis communication, digital PR, entertainment PR
pros: Exciting — work with brands, celebrities, politicians
Crisis management is high-stakes and well-paid
cons: Low pay early on at agencies

criminologist.title: Criminologist / Forensic Expert
criminologist.description: Study crime patterns, criminal behavior, and forensic evidence to help law enforcement solve crimes and prevent future ones.
roadmap: Clear 12th with PCB or Arts
Get BSc Forensic Science or BA Criminology (3 years)
Complete MSc Forensic Science or MA Criminology for better roles
Work at: Police forensic labs, CBI forensic units, private investigation agencies, courts
Specialize: fingerprints, DNA analysis, digital forensics, document examination, toxicology
For digital forensics: learn cybersecurity + forensic tools (Autopsy, FTK)
top_institutes: Gujarat Forensic Sciences University (GFSU) — best in India
Lok Nayak Jayaprakash Narayan National Institute of Criminology Hyderabad
cons: Crime scene exposure can be disturbing
Career dependent on law enforcement demand

astrologer.title: Astrologer / Vedic Astrology Expert
astrologer.description: Practice Jyotish (Vedic astrology) or Western astrology to provide guidance on life decisions — career, marriage, health, finance.

requirements.min_education: No fixed requirement — study of astrology texts

roadmap: Study Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra and other classical Vedic texts
Learn calculations: Kundali preparation, planetary positions, dasha systems
Get Jyotish Acharya degree from recognized Sanskrit universities (optional but adds credibility)
Learn astrology software: Jagannatha Hora (free), Parashara's Light
Start giving free consultations to build credibility and testimonials
Build YouTube channel / Instagram for content and client acquisition
Move to paid consultations: per session or monthly retainer
astrologer.cost_estimate: Very low — text and software based
cons: Can attract vulnerable people needing responsible handling

travel_agent.title: Travel Agent / Tourism Professional
travel_agent.description: Plan and book travel — flights, hotels, itineraries, visas, cruises — for leisure or business travelers.

requirements.min_education: Any graduation / Diploma in Travel & Tourism

roadmap: Complete any graduation or diploma in Travel & Tourism
Get IATA (International Air Transport Association) certification — globally recognized
Learn GDS (Global Distribution Systems): Amadeus, Sabre, Galileo
Join travel agencies: MakeMyTrip, Yatra, Thomas Cook India, Cox & Kings, or IRCTC
Specialize: luxury travel, adventure tourism, medical tourism, MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, Exhibitions)
Start own travel agency after 3-4 years of experience
top_institutes: Frankfinn Institute of Air Hostess Training
pros: Travel perks: discounted flights and hotels
Medical tourism and adventure tourism booming
cons: Online booking apps competing with agents
Long working hours in peak season

cabin_crew.title: Cabin Crew / Flight Attendant
cabin_crew.description: Ensure passenger safety and comfort on flights. Work for domestic or international airlines.
