requirements.medical: Height minimum (typically 157 cm for women, 170 cm for men), vision, fitness

roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream (graduation preferred)
Apply directly to airline hiring portals when recruitment opens
Clear written test + group discussion + personal interview + medical check
Complete airline's in-house training program (4-8 weeks)
Receive aircraft type specific emergency training certification
Join as cabin crew — domestic first, then international routes
Airlines: IndiGo, Air India, SpiceJet, Vistara, GoAir (India) | Emirates, Qatar, Etihad (international)
cabin_crew.cost_estimate: Pre-training course: 50,000 - 2 Lakhs (not mandatory but helps)
entrance_exams: Airline specific written test + interview (no standardized exam)

pilot_drone.title: Drone Pilot / UAS Operator
pilot_drone.description: Operate unmanned aerial vehicles (drones) for photography, agriculture, delivery, survey, defense, or inspection purposes.
roadmap: Complete 10th or 12th in any stream
Get DGCA drone pilot license (RPA Certificate) — mandatory for commercial operations
Complete DGCA approved Remote Pilot Training Organization (RPTO) course
Practice flying different drone types: multirotor, fixed wing
Specialize: agriculture spraying drones (high demand), aerial photography, survey/mapping, delivery, inspection
Join companies: Throttle Aerospace, IdeaForge, Garuda Aerospace, Zipline, or start own service
pilot_drone.cost_estimate: RPTO training: 25,000-75,000 Rs | Drone equipment: 50K-5 Lakhs
pros: India's drone policy is very progressive
Low entry barrier vs conventional aviation

makeup_artist.title: Makeup Artist
makeup_artist.description: Apply makeup and prosthetics for film, TV, bridal, fashion, theater, and editorial shoots.

requirements.min_education: Any 12th / Diploma in Beauty and Cosmetology

roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get professional makeup certification from VLCC, Lakme Academy, or CIDESCO
Assist senior makeup artists on shoots and events to learn on the job
Build portfolio by doing makeup for free photoshoots initially
Specialize: bridal makeup, film/TV makeup, SFX (Special Effects) makeup, editorial
Build Instagram portfolio — it's your digital resume
Network with photographers, wedding planners, film production houses
entrance_exams: No formal exam — skill assessment by school
pros: Bollywood and wedding industry are huge

ayurvedic_doctor.title: Ayurvedic Doctor (BAMS)
ayurvedic_doctor.description: Practice traditional Indian medicine system — Ayurveda — for holistic health and disease prevention.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB
Appear for NEET-UG — BAMS admissions use NEET scores
Complete 5.5-year BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery) including 1-year internship
Register with state Ayurvedic Medical Board
Work in Ayurvedic hospitals, wellness resorts, own clinic, AYUSH dispensaries
AYUSH Ministry is actively promoting — government jobs increasing
Option: MD Ayurveda (3 years) for specialization
pros: Wellness and spa industry growing fast
cons: Less recognition than allopathy in urban areas
Requires own practice to earn well

homeopathic_doctor.title: Homeopathic Doctor (BHMS)
homeopathic_doctor.description: Practice homeopathy — a system of medicine using highly diluted substances to trigger the body's natural healing systems.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB
Appear for NEET-UG — BHMS uses NEET scores
Complete 5.5-year BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery)
Register with Central Council of Homeopathy (CCH)
Open own clinic or join homeopathic hospitals
AYUSH dispensaries offer government opportunities
MD Homeopathy for specialization and academic roles

venture_capitalist.title: Venture Capitalist (VC)
venture_capitalist.description: Invest money into early-stage startups in exchange for equity, help them grow, and earn returns when they get acquired or go public.
roadmap: Get strong graduation from IIT/IIM or top college
Work 3-5 years in investment banking, consulting, or as a startup founder
Build network in startup ecosystem — attend Nasscom, TiE events
Join a VC firm as Analyst or Associate: Sequoia India, Accel, Blume, Matrix Partners
Evaluate startups, conduct due diligence, prepare investment memos
Progress: Analyst → Associate → Principal → Partner → General Partner
OR raise your own fund after building reputation and LP relationships
venture_capitalist.duration: 5-10 years of industry experience before becoming partner
cons: Very hard to break in without top pedigree
Long feedback loop — takes years to know if investment succeeded

private_equity.title: Private Equity (PE) Professional
private_equity.description: Buy controlling stakes in mature companies, improve their operations, and sell them at a profit after 3-7 years.
roadmap: Get top graduation + 2-3 years in investment banking (most common route)
Build LBO (Leveraged Buyout) modeling and valuation skills
Clear interviews at PE firms: KKR India, Blackstone, Carlyle, Warburg Pincus, Apax
Work as Associate → VP → Principal → Managing Director
MBA from IIM/Harvard significantly helps for senior roles
Focus on deal sourcing, portfolio company management, exit planning
private_equity.duration: 2-3 yrs IB + MBA + PE = 7-10 years to senior level

hedge_fund_manager.title: Hedge Fund Manager / Quantitative Analyst
hedge_fund_manager.description: Manage pooled funds using sophisticated strategies — long/short equity, derivatives, algorithmic trading — to generate returns.
roadmap: Get BTech in CS/Maths or BSc Statistics with very strong grades
Learn: Python, C++, statistics, financial math, stochastic calculus
Get CFA or FRM certification
Join as quant researcher/trader at prop trading firms: Optiver, Jane Street, Virtu
Build track record of alpha generation
Indian hedge funds: Edelweiss Alternatives, Avendus, ASK Investment Managers
hedge_fund_manager.duration: 5-8 years to reach PM (Portfolio Manager) level
pros: Highest earning in finance if successful
cons: Strategies stop working — constant innovation needed

credit_analyst.title: Credit Analyst / Credit Risk Manager
credit_analyst.description: Assess creditworthiness of individuals and businesses for banks, NBFCs, and rating agencies to decide lending decisions.
roadmap: Complete BCom, BBA, or CA
Learn: financial statement analysis, ratio analysis, credit scoring models
Get FRM (Financial Risk Manager) or CFA certification
Join banks: HDFC, ICICI, Axis, SBI credit departments
OR join rating agencies: CRISIL, ICRA, CARE Ratings, India Ratings
Progress: Credit Analyst → Senior Analyst → Credit Manager → Chief Credit Officer
pros: Core banking role — always in demand
cons: Cyclical — job cuts during economic downturns

wealth_manager.title: Wealth Manager / Private Banker
wealth_manager.description: Manage investment portfolios and financial planning for high-net-worth individuals (HNIs) and ultra-HNIs.
roadmap: Complete any graduation — commerce/economics preferred
Get NISM Series V-A (Mutual Fund Distributor) certification
Get CFP (Certified Financial Planner) certification — most important
Join private banking division: Kotak Wealth, HDFC Private Bank, IIFL Wealth, Edelweiss Wealth
Build AUM (Assets Under Management) — your book of business is your career
Progress: RM → Senior RM → VP → Director → Chief Wealth Officer
wealth_manager.duration: 1-2 years to get certified + build client base
pros: India's wealth management market growing fast
cons: Market crashes hurt client portfolios and relationships

microfinance_professional.title: Microfinance Professional / Financial Inclusion Officer
microfinance_professional.description: Provide small loans and financial services to underbanked rural and semi-urban populations through MFIs and SFBs.
roadmap: Complete any graduation
Join microfinance institutions: Bandhan Bank, Ujjivan SFB, Arohan, Spandana, BFIL
Start as Field Officer — visit villages, assess creditworthiness, disburse loans
Learn about SHG (Self Help Groups), JLG (Joint Liability Groups) lending models
Progress to Branch Manager → Area Manager → Regional Head
MBA in Rural Management from IRMA or IIFM for faster growth
pros: Bandhan Bank founder became billionaire from MFI roots

forensic_accountant.title: Forensic Accountant / Fraud Investigator
forensic_accountant.description: Investigate financial fraud, embezzlement, and white-collar crimes using accounting skills for courts, regulators, and corporations.
roadmap: Complete CA or MBA Finance or BCom with strong accounting
Get CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) certification from ACFE — globally recognized
Join: Big 4 forensic divisions (Deloitte Forensics, EY FIDS, KPMG Forensics, PWC FI)
OR join CBI, SFIO (Serious Fraud Investigation Office), ED (Enforcement Directorate)
Work on: fraud investigations, asset tracing, litigation support, dispute resolution
top_institutes: ICICI Manipal for forensic accounting courses
pros: Work on high-profile corporate fraud cases
cons: Needs both accounting and legal knowledge

esports_professional.title: Esports Professional / Pro Gamer
esports_professional.description: Compete professionally in video game tournaments for prize money and sponsorships in games like BGMI, Valorant, CS2, Free Fire, FIFA.

requirements.medical: Good hand-eye coordination, no repetitive strain issues

roadmap: Master one game at an elite level — typically 8-12 hours daily practice
Rank in top 0.1% of playerbase (e.g., Radiant in Valorant, Conqueror in BGMI)
Build presence on streaming platforms: YouTube Gaming, Loco, Rooter
Join an amateur or semi-pro team and compete in online tournaments
Get noticed by scouts from top orgs: S8UL, GodLike, Team XO, Orangutan
Sign with pro team — get salary + tournament winnings + brand deals
Indian games to target: BGMI, Valorant, Free Fire, FIFA Online, Chess
top_institutes: No formal institute — practice and rank up
esports_professional.duration: 2-5 years of serious practice to go pro
entrance_exams: No formal exam — in-game ranking + tournament results
cons: Very short career span (most retire by 25-28)
Extremely competitive — only top 0.01% go pro
Health issues: eye strain, wrist problems
Parental acceptance can be an issue

esports_coach.title: Esports Coach / Analyst
esports_coach.description: Train and strategize for professional esports teams, analyze opponent gameplay, and develop team tactics.
roadmap: Reach high rank in the game you want to coach (ex-pro experience is best)
Learn: VOD review, meta analysis, team communication, mental coaching
Start coaching amateur teams for free to build portfolio
Get certified: NACE Scholastic Play, Esports coaching courses on Coursera
Join teams as assistant coach → head coach
Indian orgs hiring coaches: S8UL, Revenant, GodLike, Entity Gaming
esports_coach.duration: 2-3 years of coaching experience to be taken seriously
pros: Growing number of professional orgs in India
Asian Games and Olympics inclusion boosting legitimacy
cons: Esports orgs can be financially unstable
Limited job market currently in India

esports_caster.title: Esports Caster / Gaming Commentator
esports_caster.description: Provide live commentary and analysis for esports tournaments on streams and broadcasts.
roadmap: Develop deep knowledge of esports titles you want to cast
Practice self-casting recorded games and upload to YouTube
Build a portfolio of casting demos (VODs)
Start casting small community tournaments for free
Apply to NODWIN Gaming, ESL India, Skyesports for freelance casting gigs
Build audience on Twitch/YouTube Gaming as analyst
Progress to major LAN event casting — Valorant Champions, BGMI Masters
top_institutes: No specific institute — practice and build portfolio
esports_caster.duration: 1-2 years of consistent casting demos to break in

gaming_content_creator.title: Gaming Content Creator / Gaming YouTuber
gaming_content_creator.description: Create gaming videos, live streams, reviews, and guides for YouTube, Loco, Rooter, Twitch — monetize through ads, sponsorships, and subs.
roadmap: Choose your niche: Let's Plays, tutorials, reviews, funny moments, esports analysis
Set up: good PC/console, capture card, microphone, video editing software
Post consistently — minimum 3 videos/week for first 6 months
Learn YouTube SEO, thumbnails, titles to get discovered
Monetize at 1000 subscribers + 4000 watch hours (YouTube Partner Program)
Get brand deals: gaming chairs, peripherals, energy drinks, mobile games
Indian gaming YouTubers to study: Mortal, Scout, Jonathan, Dynamo, CarryMinati
top_institutes: No institute — YouTube Creator Academy (free online)

salary.senior: 50 Lakhs - 5 Crore (top gaming creator with brand deals)

pros: Brand deal income can be massive
Indian gaming audience is hundreds of millions
cons: Algorithm can kill a channel overnight
No fixed income until large audience

graphic_novel_artist.title: Graphic Novel Artist / Comic Artist
graphic_novel_artist.description: Create sequential art storytelling for graphic novels, comics, manga-style books, webcomics, and illustrated stories.
roadmap: Master figure drawing, anatomy, perspective, sequential storytelling
Learn digital art tools: Clip Studio Paint (industry standard for comics), Procreate, Photoshop
Study comic layouts, paneling, visual storytelling techniques
Create a short 8-12 page comic and publish on Webtoon, Instagram, Tapas
Build audience for your webcomic — Indian creators doing well: Zomato Viral Comics, Student of the Year memes
Pitch to publishers: Amar Chitra Katha, Tinkle, Campfire Graphic Novels, Penguin India
For international: submit to Marvel, DC, Image Comics with portfolio
top_institutes: Sir JJ School of Art Mumbai
graphic_novel_artist.cost_estimate: iPad + Apple Pencil: 40,000-80,000 Rs | Software: Clip Studio Paint: 5000 Rs one-time
pros: Own IP can be adapted to films/shows

motion_designer.title: Motion Designer / Motion Graphics Artist
motion_designer.description: Create animated graphics, title sequences, explainer videos, and visual effects for TV, OTT, ads, and digital media.
roadmap: Learn Adobe After Effects (core tool for motion design)
Learn Cinema 4D for 3D motion graphics
Study: principles of animation, typography in motion, visual rhythm
Build showreel with 5-10 diverse motion pieces
Follow: School of Motion, Motion Design School for professional skill building
Get clients from: ad agencies, YouTube channels, corporate video production, OTT platforms
Indian demand: Zee, Sony, Colors, Netflix India, Amazon Prime India all need motion designers
entrance_exams: No formal exam — showreel based hiring

brand_designer.title: Brand Designer / Visual Identity Designer
brand_designer.description: Create complete visual identity systems for companies — logos, color palettes, typography systems, brand guidelines, and brand assets.
roadmap: Learn design fundamentals: typography, color theory, layout, grid systems
Master tools: Adobe Illustrator (logos), Photoshop, Figma
Study brand identity case studies: Nike, Zomato rebrand, Jio rebrand
Build a portfolio of 5-8 diverse brand identity projects (can be personal/concept projects)
Work at branding agencies: Landor, Interbrand, Elephant Design, DY Works India
OR go freelance — Indian brands constantly rebranding: startups need logos, identities
brand_designer.cost_estimate: Adobe CC subscription: 5000/month | NID degree: 5-8 Lakhs
brand_designer.duration: 4 years BDes or 1-2 years self-learning with portfolio
cons: Logo design is commoditized at low end
Explaining value to clients who don't understand design

typeface_designer.title: Typeface Designer / Typography Specialist
typeface_designer.description: Design custom fonts and typefaces for brands, publishing, and the global font marketplace. One of the rarest and highest-paying design specializations.
roadmap: Get strong foundation in graphic design and typography principles
Learn type design software: Glyphs App (Mac) or RoboFont
Study letterform construction, optical correction, spacing/kerning
Do MA in Typeface Design: Reading University UK (top globally) or KABK Netherlands
Create a full font family and publish on: MyFonts, Google Fonts, Adobe Fonts
Work for type foundries or build your own: India-based Type Foundry is emerging
Indian script typography (Devanagari, Tamil) is a highly niche and respected specialization
top_institutes: University of Reading UK (MA Typeface Design)
typeface_designer.cost_estimate: Glyphs App: 15,000 Rs | MA abroad: 20-40 Lakhs

salary.senior: 50 Lakhs+ (own font foundry / global licensing royalties)

entrance_exams: MA Type Design portfolio submission (no exam)
pros: Incredibly niche — very little competition in India
Indian script type design is underserved
cons: Very slow to learn — letterforms take years to master
Font sales can be slow initially
Needs MA abroad for top foundry jobs

illustrator.title: Illustrator / Digital Illustrator
illustrator.description: Create illustrations for books, magazines, advertising, social media, product packaging, and editorial content.
roadmap: Develop a distinctive illustration style through consistent practice
Learn digital tools: Procreate (iPad), Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop
Build a social media presence showing your illustration style — Instagram is essential
Create a portfolio website: Behance, personal site
Get clients: children's book publishers, greeting card companies, ad agencies, editorial (newspapers, magazines)
List on: Shutterstock, Adobe Stock, Creative Market for passive income
Indian brands regularly commission illustrators: Zomato, Swiggy, Nykaa, CRED
top_institutes: Sir JJ School of Art Mumbai
pros: Indian brands love unique illustration styles

ux_researcher.title: UX Researcher
ux_researcher.description: Conduct user research — interviews, usability tests, surveys — to understand user behavior and inform product design decisions.
roadmap: Get graduation in Psychology, Design, Computer Science, or any field
Learn UX research methods: user interviews, usability testing, surveys, card sorting
Learn tools: Maze, UserTesting, Hotjar, Optimal Workshop, Miro
Get Google UX Design Certificate (has UX research module)
Build case studies showing research → insight → design decision impact
Join product companies: Flipkart, Swiggy, PhonePe, Razorpay, Meesho all have UX Research teams
ux_researcher.cost_estimate: Google cert: free to audit | NN/g: 1-2 Lakhs
ux_researcher.duration: 6-12 months to be job ready with case studies
entrance_exams: No formal exam — case study portfolio
pros: Bridge between user psychology and product
cons: Research often deprioritized in fast-moving startups
Needs both human and data skills
Field is relatively new in India

concept_artist.title: Concept Artist
concept_artist.description: Create visual concepts for video games, films, animation, and entertainment — designing characters, environments, props, and creatures before production.
roadmap: Master traditional art fundamentals: anatomy, perspective, light and shadow, color theory
Learn digital painting: Photoshop, Clip Studio Paint, Procreate
Study entertainment design: study films, games, concept art books
Build portfolio of: character sheets, environment concepts, creature designs
Apply to game studios, film VFX houses, animation studios
Indian studios: MPC, Dneg, Prana Studios, Tata Elxsi all hire concept artists
International remote work is very common in this field

salary.senior: 30 - 80 LPA (senior concept artist at AAA studio)

pros: Work for Hollywood/AAA game studios remotely
cons: Projects can be cancelled affecting work

science_journalist.title: Science Journalist / Science Communicator
science_journalist.description: Translate complex scientific research into accessible stories for the public through newspapers, magazines, YouTube, podcasts, or science museums.

requirements.min_education: BSc + Journalism course / MSc with writing interest

roadmap: Get BSc in any science subject (Physics, Biology, Chemistry, CS)
Complete PG Diploma in Journalism or Science Communication
Intern at science magazines: Frontline, Scroll Science, The Wire Science, Down to Earth
Build bylines and portfolio of published articles
Learn multimedia: write, shoot video, record podcasts, make reels
Target: Nature India, Science magazine, BBC Science Focus India, government science bodies like CSIR
top_institutes: National Centre for Biological Sciences Bangalore (science communication program)
pros: YouTube science channels in India are booming
cons: Science literacy in India still developing

clinical_researcher.title: Clinical Research Associate / Clinical Trial Manager
clinical_researcher.description: Oversee pharmaceutical clinical trials — managing protocols, patient safety monitoring, data collection, and regulatory submissions.
roadmap: Complete BSc Biotechnology, Microbiology, Pharmacology, or BPharm
Get certified: ACRP or SOCRA clinical research certification
Complete PG Diploma in Clinical Research (PGDCR) from institutes like ICRI
Join as CRA (Clinical Research Associate) at CROs: IQVIA, Syneos, Covance, Parexel (all have India offices)
Manage trial sites, ensure GCP compliance, submit regulatory documents
Progress: CRA → Senior CRA → CRA Manager → Director Clinical Operations
pros: India is a top clinical trial destination

research_scientist.title: Research Scientist (CSIR / DST / ICMR)
research_scientist.description: Conduct scientific research at government research institutes in India under CSIR, DST, DBT, ICMR, DRDO, or ISRO.
roadmap: Complete BSc/BTech + MSc/MTech with strong grades
Clear CSIR-NET JRF or GATE for PhD fellowship (fully funded)
Complete PhD from IISc, IIT, CSIR lab, or ICMR institute
Apply for Scientist B/C positions at CSIR, DRDO, ISRO, ICAR, ICMR
Alternatively: DST INSPIRE Faculty fellowship for post-PhD joining
Progress: Scientist B → C → D → E → F → G (Director level)
research_scientist.cost_estimate: PhD is funded via JRF: 31,000-35,000/month stipend
cons: Low pay compared to industry initially

patent_examiner.title: Patent Examiner (Indian Patent Office)
patent_examiner.description: Examine patent applications to determine novelty and inventiveness, and decide whether to grant patents.
roadmap: Complete BTech or MSc in your technical field (CS, Mech, Chem, Bio etc.)
Apply for Patent Examiner recruitment by CGPDTM (Controller General of Patents, Designs and Trademarks)
Clear written exam + interview
Join Indian Patent Office: Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, Kolkata offices
Examine patent applications in your domain
Get Patent Agent exam certification for additional recognition
Progress to: Assistant Controller → Deputy Controller → Controller → CGPDTM
cons: Backlog of patents in India — stressful workload
Limited public awareness of the role

ngo_manager.title: NGO Manager / Development Sector Professional
ngo_manager.description: Lead programs and operations of non-governmental organizations working in education, health, rural development, gender equality, and environment.
roadmap: Complete any graduation — MSW or MBA in Development preferred for senior roles
Volunteer with NGOs to understand ground reality
Apply for fellowship programs: Teach For India, Gandhi Fellowship, Azim Premji Foundation
Learn: M&E (Monitoring and Evaluation), proposal writing, budget management, stakeholder reporting
Get FCRA knowledge for international funding compliance
Work with: CRY, Pratham, Akanksha, Aga Khan Foundation, UN agencies (UNICEF, UNDP)

salary.senior: 25 - 60 LPA (CEO / Country Director at large NGO)

cons: Emotional toll of working with marginalized communities

sustainability_consultant.title: Sustainability Consultant / ESG Analyst
sustainability_consultant.description: Help companies reduce environmental impact, achieve carbon neutrality, and comply with ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) reporting standards.
roadmap: Complete BTech Environmental, MBA Sustainability, or BSc Environmental Science
Get certified: GRI (Global Reporting Initiative), CDP, LEED AP, ISO 14001 Lead Auditor
Learn: carbon accounting, ESG reporting frameworks (BRSR in India), LCA (Life Cycle Assessment)
Join consulting firms: EY, Deloitte, KPMG ESG practices, or boutique firms like Emergent, Cygni Energy
Corporate sustainability departments: Tata, Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro all have large sustainability teams
pros: SEBI BRSR mandate making ESG mandatory for Indian listed companies
cons: Relatively new in India — fewer senior jobs currently

policy_analyst.title: Policy Analyst / Public Policy Professional
policy_analyst.description: Research and analyze government policies, develop policy recommendations, and work at think tanks, government bodies, or international organizations.

requirements.min_education: Graduation + MPP or MA Economics/Political Science

roadmap: Complete graduation in Economics, Political Science, Law, or any field
Get MPP (Master of Public Policy) from top schools or MA Economics from DSE/JNU
Intern at: NITI Aayog, think tanks (ORF, CPR, IDFC Institute), UNDP, World Bank
Build expertise in one policy domain: health, education, agriculture, digital, environment
Publish policy briefs, papers, and commentaries
Join: NITI Aayog, Ministry policy wings, World Bank, ADB, or research think tanks
top_institutes: Jindal School of Government and Public Policy
Lee Kuan Yew School of Public Policy Singapore (abroad)
cons: Low pay at domestic think tanks
Research impact takes years to materialize

agrotech_entrepreneur.title: Agritech Entrepreneur / Farm Tech Founder
agrotech_entrepreneur.description: Build technology solutions for Indian agriculture — precision farming, supply chain, farmer fintech, crop monitoring, drone agri-services.
roadmap: Get BTech CS, BSc Agriculture, or any STEM degree
Understand Indian farming pain points — spend time in rural areas
Study successful agritech companies: Ninjacart, DeHaat, AgriBazaar, Fasal, CropIn
Build MVP: can be app for farmers, drone service, marketplace, soil testing kit
Apply to agritech accelerators: NABVENTURES, Omnivore, Ankur Capital, Bharat Inclusion Initiative
Raise seed funding from impact investors focused on agriculture

salary.senior: Unlimited — equity value if startup succeeds

pros: India's agriculture sector needs massive tech upgrade
cons: Very hard to sell to farmers — trust deficit
Weather and crop failure risk affects business

sports_analyst.title: Sports Data Analyst / Performance Analyst
sports_analyst.description: Use data and video analysis to optimize athlete and team performance in cricket, football, kabaddi, and other sports.
roadmap: Get BTech CS, BSc Statistics, or BSc Sports Science
Learn: Python/R for data analysis, SQL, Tableau/Power BI
Learn sports-specific analysis tools: Catapult, Hudl, SportsCode, Hawk-Eye
Build cricket/football analysis projects using publicly available datasets (Cricsheet, FBref)
Intern with IPL franchises, Pro Kabaddi teams, ISL clubs, or national sports federations
Get certified: IBM Data Science, CSIA (Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist)
sports_analyst.duration: 2-4 years to get into a professional sports team

salary.senior: 25 - 60 LPA (National team lead analyst / head of performance)

entrance_exams: No specific exam — portfolio and experience based
pros: National sports teams all building analytics units
Combine passion for sports with data skills
cons: Sports organizations slow to adopt analytics

sports_psychologist.title: Sports Psychologist
sports_psychologist.description: Help athletes overcome mental blocks, build confidence, manage performance anxiety, and achieve peak mental state for competition.
roadmap: Complete BSc/BA Psychology (3 years)
Complete MSc Sport and Exercise Psychology (2 years)
Get RCI registration as psychologist
Work with sports academies, SAI athletes, IPL/ISL teams
Get certified: ISSP (International Society of Sport Psychology) recognition
Build track record through individual athlete consulting
National teams: Indian cricket, hockey, athletics all employ sports psychologists
pros: Very niche — few qualified practitioners in India
IPL and ISL teams investing heavily
cons: Low awareness among athletes and teams
India sports ecosystem is still developing this

referee_umpire.title: Sports Referee / Umpire
referee_umpire.description: Officiate sports matches ensuring fair play and rules compliance — cricket umpire, football referee, tennis umpire, kabaddi referee.
roadmap: Choose your sport and learn its rules thoroughly
Get beginner referee certification from the national federation (BCCI for cricket, AIFF for football)
Officiate at local/district level tournaments to gain experience
Get national panel certification after clearing federation exams
Work up to state-level matches, then national tournaments
For cricket: Elite Panel umpires are selected by BCCI from the national panel
ICC panel umpire is the highest level for international cricket
pros: IPL and international matches pay very well
cons: Full-time income only at elite level
Takes very long to reach top level
Requires staying updated on rule changes

talent_scout.title: Sports Talent Scout / Recruitment Specialist
talent_scout.description: Identify talented athletes across grassroots level and recruit them for clubs, academies, and national teams.

requirements.min_education: Sports Science / Any graduation with sports background

roadmap: Have strong sports background either as player, coach, or sports science graduate
Learn talent identification frameworks and athlete evaluation criteria
Get sports analytics tools exposure
Join IPL franchises, ISL clubs, state cricket associations, Pro Kabaddi teams
Build a network across districts, schools, and academies
Work with government programs: SAI, Khelo India, state sports academies

salary.senior: 25 - 50 LPA (Head of Scouting at major franchise)

entrance_exams: No formal exam — experience + network based
pros: IPL and ISL creating formal scouting departments
Exciting role — discover the next Virat Kohli
cons: Few formal positions currently in India
Judgment calls on talent are high pressure

gemologist.title: Gemologist / Jewellery Designer
gemologist.description: Grade, evaluate, and authenticate precious gemstones and design fine jewellery for the luxury and retail market.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get Graduate Gemologist (GG) degree from GIA — gold standard globally
OR get GJEPC certified Gemologist (India-based, more affordable)
Learn 4Cs of diamond grading: Cut, Clarity, Colour, Carat
Learn coloured gemstone identification: ruby, emerald, sapphire, etc.
Work at: jewellery brands (Tanishq, Kalyan, PNG), auction houses (Christie's, Sotheby's), gem labs (IGI, GIA India), exporters in Surat/Mumbai
top_institutes: GIA (Gemological Institute of America) — Mumbai and Surat offices

salary.senior: 25 - 80 LPA (senior grader at auction house / own business)

pros: India is world's largest diamond processing hub (Surat)

ethical_fashion.title: Ethical Fashion Professional / Sustainable Fashion Designer
ethical_fashion.description: Design and build fashion businesses that prioritize sustainability, fair trade, and ethical supply chains.
roadmap: Get BDes from NIFT or NID with focus on sustainable textiles
Learn: natural dyes, organic fabrics, upcycling, circular fashion principles
Study brands: Doodlage, No Nasties, Buna, Upasana Design Studio (Indian ethical fashion leaders)
Get certified: Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS), Fair Trade certification
Build a brand using local artisans, natural materials, and transparent supply chain
Sell through: own website, Etsy, Good Earth, FabIndia, or export to international ethical fashion buyers
top_institutes: AIACA (All India Artisans and Craftworkers Welfare Association) programs
ethical_fashion.duration: 4 years NIFT + 2 years to launch brand
pros: International ethical fashion buyers seeking India
B Corp and GOTS certification adds credibility
cons: Higher production costs vs fast fashion

antarctic_researcher.title: Antarctic / Arctic Researcher (Polar Scientist)
antarctic_researcher.description: Conduct scientific research at polar regions — climate, oceanography, geology, biology — as part of India's National Centre for Polar and Ocean Research.

requirements.min_education: MSc / PhD in Earth Science, Oceanography, or related
requirements.medical: Strict medical fitness for extreme cold conditions

roadmap: Complete BSc/MSc in Oceanography, Earth Science, Glaciology, Atmospheric Science
Complete PhD from NCPOR, IIT, or NIOs
Apply for NCPOR (National Centre for Polar and Ocean Research) scientist positions
Get selected for Indian Scientific Expedition to Antarctica (ISEA) — India runs expeditions every year
Spend 3-12 months at Maitri or Bharati station in Antarctica
Publish research from polar data — highly prestigious
antarctic_researcher.cost_estimate: PhD is funded | Expedition costs fully borne by government
pros: Most unique career in India — literally go to Antarctica
cons: Physically and mentally demanding polar expeditions

space_scientist.title: Space Scientist / ISRO Scientist
space_scientist.description: Work on India's space program — satellite design, launch vehicles, space exploration, remote sensing, and planetary science at ISRO.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with 85%+ marks
Get BTech in Aerospace, Electronics, CS, Mechanical or MSc Physics/Maths/Electronics
Apply for ISRO Centralized Recruitment Board (ICRB) exam — held annually
Clear written test + interview (highly competitive — 1% selection)
Join as Scientist/Engineer SC (entry level)
Work at ISRO centers: VSSC, ISAC, SAC, URSC, NRSC, LPSC
Progress: Scientist SC → SD → SE → SF → SG → Outstanding Scientist
space_scientist.cost_estimate: 5-15 Lakhs for BTech | IIST is heavily subsidized
pros: Work on Chandrayaan, Gaganyaan, Aditya L1 missions
cons: Government salary is lower than private tech
Life in smaller cities near ISRO centers

oceanographer.title: Oceanographer / Marine Scientist
oceanographer.description: Study oceans — marine ecosystems, ocean currents, underwater geology, fisheries, and climate impact of oceans.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB or PCM
Get BSc Marine Science or BSc Physics/Chemistry
Complete MSc Oceanography from Goa University, BHU, Andhra University
Clear CSIR-NET or GATE for PhD/research roles
Join NIO Goa, NCPOR, INCOIS Hyderabad, state fisheries departments, DRDO-NMRL
Fieldwork: research ships, underwater surveys, buoy deployment
top_institutes: Cochin University of Science and Technology
oceanographer.duration: BSc 3 + MSc 2 + PhD 5 = up to 10 years for research career
pros: Blue economy is India's next focus
Climate change research is globally funded
NIO and NCPOR are world-class labs
cons: Long sea voyages away from family

wildlife_biologist.title: Wildlife Biologist / Conservation Scientist
wildlife_biologist.description: Study and protect wild animals and their habitats in forests, national parks, marine areas, and conservation organizations.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCB
Get BSc Zoology, Wildlife Science, or Forestry (3 years)
Complete MSc Wildlife Science from WII or Forestry from FRI
Field internships at national parks, tiger reserves, Project Tiger, Project Elephant
Join: Wildlife Institute of India (WII), BNHS, NCF, WWF India, Forest Department
Clear IFS exam for Indian Forest Service officer route
PhD for research scientist roles
pros: Work in India's stunning national parks
Tiger Project and other conservation missions are global icons
cons: Very low pay at junior levels
Limited urban career options in this field

archaeologist.title: Archaeologist
archaeologist.description: Study human history through excavation of sites and analysis of artefacts, ancient structures, and historical remains.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream (Arts/Science)
Get BA Archaeology or BA History (3 years)
Complete MA Archaeology from BHU, DU, or Deccan College Pune
Join excavations as field assistant during MA to gain experience
Clear ASI (Archaeological Survey of India) recruitment for government archaeologist post
Academic route: PhD and become professor at Deccan College, BHU, or Panjab University
top_institutes: Deccan College Post-Graduate and Research Institute Pune (top in India)
entrance_exams: ASI (Archaeological Survey of India) recruitment exam
pros: India has one of world's richest archaeological heritages
ASI is government job with security
cons: Low pay compared to education years

museum_curator.title: Museum Curator / Art Curator
museum_curator.description: Manage and develop museum collections, organize exhibitions, research artefacts, and make cultural heritage accessible to the public.

requirements.min_education: MA Art History / Archaeology / Museum Studies

roadmap: Complete BA Art History, Archaeology, History, or Fine Arts
Complete MA Museum Studies or MA Art History
Intern at national museums: National Museum Delhi, NGMA, Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya
Join as Junior Curator / Assistant Curator
Build expertise in a specific collection area: Indian textiles, Mughal art, sculpture, contemporary art
Progress to Senior Curator → Chief Curator → Director
top_institutes: National Museum Institute Delhi (offers MA Museum Studies)
entrance_exams: NMI Delhi entrance for MA Museum Studies
pros: Private art galleries and auction houses pay well

fashion_stylist.title: Fashion Stylist / Celebrity Stylist
fashion_stylist.description: Curate outfits and looks for photoshoots, films, celebrities, weddings, and editorial magazines.
roadmap: Complete NIFT Fashion Communication or BDes Fashion Design
OR do a short course at Pearl Academy / Grazia Fashion Styling courses
Assist senior stylists on shoots for free — crucial for breaking in
Build a mood board portfolio and Instagram presence
Work your way up: editorial stylist → celebrity stylist → brand consultant
Mumbai is the hub — connect with photographers, designers, PR agencies

salary.senior: 30 - 1 Crore (celebrity stylist: Anaita Shroff Adajania, Shaleena Nathani level)

pros: Bollywood and fashion industry are massive
India's fashion scene is global now

voice_actor.title: Voice Actor / Dubbing Artist
voice_actor.description: Provide voices for animated characters, dubbed films and shows, audiobooks, video games, advertisements, and AI voice systems.

requirements.min_education: No fixed requirement — voice quality and training matter

roadmap: Train your voice: take voice acting classes, study vocal techniques, breathing
Practice: read aloud for 30 mins daily, record yourself, review and improve
Learn audio recording basics: home studio setup, Audacity/Adobe Audition
Create a demo reel covering different styles: commercial, character, narration
Register on: Voice123, Backstage, Casting Call Club (international) + Indian casting portals
For dubbing: join dubbing studios in Mumbai, Chennai — Sony YAY, Disney, Netflix India all dub
Build: commercial voice artist + audiobook narrator for steady income
top_institutes: Film and Television Institute of India (FTII)
Online: Such A Voice, Edge Studio
voice_actor.cost_estimate: Home studio: 20,000-80,000 Rs | Voice training: 10,000-50,000 Rs
voice_actor.duration: 6-12 months of training to start working

salary.senior: 20 - 60 LPA (top voice artists / celebrity AI voice licensing)

entrance_exams: No formal exam — demo reel is your application
pros: OTT dubbing boom — every Netflix/Prime show needs Hindi/regional dubbing
AI voice training is new revenue stream

radio_jockey.title: Radio Jockey (RJ) / Podcast Host
radio_jockey.description: Host radio shows, interact with listeners, conduct interviews, and create audio content for FM radio or podcasts.
roadmap: Complete any graduation or diploma in Mass Communication/Journalism
Get voice training and presentation skills practice
Do internship at local FM radio station as production assistant
Audition at radio stations: Red FM, Radio Mirchi, Big FM, Radio City
Start with smaller markets or college radio stations
Parallel: start a podcast on Spotify/Apple Podcasts to build following
For podcasting: monetize via Spotify, brand sponsorships, paid subscriptions (Patreon)
radio_jockey.cost_estimate: 1-4 Lakhs for mass comm degree | Podcast: minimal setup cost
radio_jockey.duration: 1-3 years to land stable RJ position
pros: Podcast revolution creating new income streams
cons: Radio industry is shrinking with podcasting
Very competitive to get hired at good stations
Income plateau in radio at mid-level

stand_up_comedian.title: Stand-up Comedian / Comedy Content Creator
stand_up_comedian.description: Perform live comedy shows, create comedy content for YouTube and OTT, and build a career in entertainment through humor.

requirements.min_education: No requirement — humor is the only prerequisite

roadmap: Start writing jokes and performing at open mics — Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore all have active scenes
Perform for free at open mics for 1-2 years to refine material
Record and post short comedy videos on Instagram/YouTube
Build following and get booked for paid gigs
Get featured on Amazon Prime, Netflix specials, or YouTube channels
Expand to: writing for shows, acting, hosting events, brand collaborations
India's comedians to study: Zakir Khan, Kanan Gill, Biswa, Kunal Kamra
top_institutes: No institute — open mics are the school
stand_up_comedian.cost_estimate: Minimal — just your time and courage
stand_up_comedian.duration: 2-5 years of open mics before sustainable income
entrance_exams: No exam — open mic performance is everything
cons: Income is extremely uncertain early on
Emotional resilience needed for bad gigs

food_blogger.title: Food Blogger / Food Content Creator
food_blogger.description: Create content around food — restaurant reviews, recipes, cooking videos, and food culture for YouTube, Instagram, and blogs.
roadmap: Develop deep passion for food and good taste palate
Start with Instagram food photography — learn food styling basics
Create a YouTube channel for recipe videos or restaurant reviews
Invest in decent camera, ring light, and editing software
Build audience through consistent posting and SEO-friendly content
Monetize: brand deals (Swiggy, Zomato, food brands), YouTube AdSense, restaurant partnerships, cookbooks
Courses and workshops become income streams at scale
top_institutes: No institute — practice and passion are enough
pros: Restaurants pay for reviews and collabs
Indian food culture = massive audience globally
Zomato, Swiggy pay top creators well
cons: Saturated market — thousands of food creators

travel_blogger.title: Travel Blogger / Travel Content Creator
travel_blogger.description: Create travel content — vlogs, blogs, photography — sharing destinations, travel tips, budget guides, and cultural experiences.
roadmap: Start a travel blog or YouTube channel documenting your travels
Learn travel photography and video creation
Build a niche: budget travel, luxury travel, solo female travel, India travel, adventure travel
Monetize: affiliate marketing (booking.com, Airbnb), brand sponsorships, hotel partnerships
Apply for tourism board partnerships: India Tourism, state tourism boards
Build to 100K+ subscribers for significant brand deal income
top_institutes: No institute — travel is the school
travel_blogger.cost_estimate: Camera + drone: 1-3 Lakhs | Travel costs vary

salary.senior: 30 Lakhs - 2 Crore (top travel creators: Dude for Food level)

pros: Travel for work — hotels and airlines sponsor stays
cons: Algorithm changes can collapse income overnight

indie_filmmaker.title: Indie Filmmaker / Independent Film Director
indie_filmmaker.description: Write, direct, and produce independent films for OTT platforms, film festivals, and theatrical release.

requirements.min_education: FTII / SRFTI / Self-taught with strong portfolio

roadmap: Study cinema: watch 1000 films across genres and cultures
Learn filmmaking: directing, screenwriting, cinematography, editing
Get formal training at FTII Pune or SRFTI Kolkata OR make short films independently
Make short films — submit to film festivals: MAMI, IFFK, BIFF
Build a body of work to attract OTT platform interest (Netflix India, Amazon Prime, Disney Hotstar)
Network with producers, actors, cinematographers at film events
Apply for government grants: NFDC (National Film Development Corporation) funds indie films
top_institutes: FTII Pune (Film and Television Institute of India)
indie_filmmaker.cost_estimate: FTII: 50,000-2 Lakhs | Self-made films: 50K-50 Lakhs depending on scale

salary.fresher: Variable — festival circuit income, occasional OTT commissions
salary.mid_level: 15 - 50 LPA (OTT film director with multiple projects)

cons: Projects take years from idea to screen
Mental health challenges in creative uncertainty

screenwriter.title: Screenwriter / Script Writer
screenwriter.description: Write scripts for films, OTT series, TV shows, web series, and short films.
roadmap: Read 50+ produced screenplays across genres (free at Simply Scripts)
Take screenwriting courses: Coursera, MasterClass Aaron Sorkin, Script Lab
Learn screenplay format: Final Draft or free tools like Celtx
Write your first feature screenplay or 3-episode pilot spec script
Get it reviewed on: The Black List, coverage services, script competitions
Move to Mumbai or work online — pitch to: OTT platforms, production houses, directors
Join a writers room as junior writer for OTT series (Netflix, Amazon, Disney are building Indian writers rooms)
screenwriter.duration: 1-3 years of writing + networking to get first paid work
pros: OTT platforms desperately need Indian writers
Multiple format options: films, series, web series

textile_designer.title: Textile Designer
textile_designer.description: Design patterns, weaves, and surface designs for fabrics used in fashion, home furnishings, and industrial applications.
roadmap: Clear 12th in any stream
Appear for NID, NIFT, or CEPT entrance exams
Complete BDes in Textile Design (4 years)
Learn: weave structures, natural dyeing, digital textile printing, CAD for textiles (EAT/NedGraphics software)
Intern at textile companies, saree manufacturers, apparel exporters
Work at: Fabindia, Manyavar, saree weavers cooperatives, fashion export houses
OR start own sustainable textile brand using Indian handloom heritage
top_institutes: NID Ahmedabad (Textile Design — top in India)
IICD Jaipur (Indian Institute of Crafts & Design)
pros: India is world's 2nd largest textile exporter
Blend of traditional craft and modern design
cons: Low pay at traditional weaving sector end
India's handloom sector faces competition from power looms

product_designer.title: Product Designer / Industrial Designer
product_designer.description: Design physical products — consumer electronics, furniture, medical devices, household appliances — balancing aesthetics, function, and manufacturing.
roadmap: Clear 12th and appear for NID/UCEED entrance exams
Complete BDes in Industrial/Product Design (4 years)
Learn: SolidWorks/Rhino/Fusion 360 (3D CAD for design), Keyshot (rendering)
Build portfolio of products showing: ideation sketches → 3D models → prototypes
Intern at product companies: Bosch India, Godrej Appliances, Tata Elxsi, HCL Design
OR join design consultancies: Frog, IDEO (Mumbai office), Think Design
top_institutes: NID Ahmedabad (best Industrial Design in India)
pros: India's manufacturing push under 'Make in India' creating demand
International design firms have India offices
cons: Indian industry slow to value design

patent_agent.title: Patent Agent
patent_agent.description: Prepare and file patent applications on behalf of inventors and companies before the Indian Patent Office and international patent bodies.
roadmap: Get BTech, BE, or BSc in any science or engineering field
Clear Indian Patent Agent Exam — conducted by Office of the Controller General of Patents
Register as Patent Agent with Indian Patent Office
Join IP law firms: Anand and Anand, Remfry & Sagar, K&S Partners, DePenning & DePenning
Build specialization: technology patents (CS, biotech, pharma, mechanical)
Learn: PCT (Patent Cooperation Treaty) for international filings, EPO, USPTO procedures
top_institutes: Patent Agent Exam prep resources from CGPDTM website
patent_agent.cost_estimate: Exam fee: 1000 Rs | Prep materials: 5,000-20,000 Rs
pros: IP law firms pay very well
cons: Patent Agent exam is moderately difficult
Writing patent claims is a specialized skill
Needs domain expertise in a technical field

legal_tech.title: Legal Technology Professional (LegalTech)
legal_tech.description: Work at the intersection of law and technology — building legal software, AI-based contract review, legal research tools, and court management systems.

requirements.min_education: LLB + Tech skills OR BTech + LLB

roadmap: Get LLB (3 or 5 year) and simultaneously learn: Python, SQL, product management
OR get BTech and do short law course / LLM
Learn legal tech tools: Kira, Luminance, Contract Express, Relativity
Build understanding of: contract management, e-discovery, legal research automation
Join: legaltech startups (Legality, LegalKart, LegalDocs India, SpotDraft), or law firm tech departments of Big 4
Alternative: join courts' e-court technology projects (Government of India Digital India Courts)
pros: Court digitization under eCourts Mission Mode Project
cons: Very niche — needs both skills simultaneously
Indian legal tech ecosystem is early stage

mediator.title: Mediator / Dispute Resolution Professional
mediator.description: Help parties in conflict reach mutually agreeable settlements without going to court, in commercial, family, labor, and community disputes.

requirements.min_education: LLB or any graduation + Mediation certification

roadmap: Complete LLB or any graduation (LLB preferred for legal mediation)
Get 40-hour basic mediation certification from IIAM or IMC
Get 200-hour advanced mediation certification from internationally accredited body
Register as empanelled mediator with courts, consumer forums, SEBI, RERA
Build reputation through handling small commercial disputes first
The Mediation Act 2023 passed in India — creates mandatory pre-litigation mediation — massive opportunity
top_institutes: IIAM (Indian Institute of Arbitration and Mediation)
pros: Mediation Act 2023 creates mandatory pre-litigation mediation = massive new market
Can practice part-time alongside other work
cons: Parties not always ready to settle

compliance_officer.title: Compliance Officer / Regulatory Affairs
compliance_officer.description: Ensure companies follow all applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies across financial services, pharma, IT, and other regulated industries.
roadmap: Complete CA, LLB, MBA, or Company Secretary (CS) qualification
Learn regulatory frameworks: SEBI regulations, RBI guidelines, Companies Act, FEMA
Get certified: Certified Compliance and Ethics Professional (CCEP) or ICA compliance certifications
Join compliance departments: banks, NBFCs, pharma companies (FDA compliance), IT companies (GDPR)
Progress: Compliance Executive → Manager → Head of Compliance → Chief Compliance Officer
pros: Every regulated company must have compliance — huge job market
Post-Yes Bank/IL&FS crisis, compliance pay skyrocketed
cons: Slow career path at PSU banks

arbitrator.title: Arbitrator / International Commercial Arbitrator
arbitrator.description: Act as a private judge resolving commercial disputes between companies through arbitration, avoiding lengthy court proceedings.
roadmap: Get LLB and practice as lawyer for 10+ years in commercial law
OR become senior professional in a specialized field (engineering, finance, construction)
Get trained in arbitration: ICADR, ICA, ICC courses
Get empanelled with arbitral institutions: DIAC, MCIA, ICC, LCIA, SIAC
Build a reputation for expertise in a specific industry — this leads to appointment as arbitrator
Senior lawyers and retired judges dominate — start early as counsel in arbitrations
arbitrator.duration: Minimum 10-15 years of legal/professional career before arbitrating
pros: Extremely high earning at top level
India-seated arbitration growing with DIAC, MCIA

data_engineer.title: Data Engineer
data_engineer.description: Build and maintain the infrastructure and pipelines that enable data scientists and analysts to access and use data reliably.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or strong self-learning background
Learn: SQL (advanced), Python (Pandas, PySpark), Bash scripting
Learn Big Data tools: Apache Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, Airflow
Learn cloud data services: AWS Redshift/Glue, GCP BigQuery, Azure Synapse
Build portfolio projects: build an end-to-end data pipeline with public datasets
Get certified: AWS Data Engineer, Google Professional Data Engineer
Apply at: data-heavy companies — Flipkart, PhonePe, Ola, Dream11, Razorpay all have large data teams
entrance_exams: No specific exam — GitHub portfolio + interview
pros: Very high demand — every company collecting data needs this
Less competitive than ML Engineer but similar pay
Quick salary growth with tools expertise
cons: Plumbing work — less glamorous than data science
Pipeline failures at 3 AM on-call responsibility

nlp_engineer.title: NLP Engineer / Conversational AI Engineer
nlp_engineer.description: Build natural language processing systems — chatbots, voice assistants, text classification, sentiment analysis, and LLM-powered applications.

requirements.min_education: BTech CS / MSc AI / Data Science

roadmap: Get BTech CS or strong ML foundation
Learn: Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers library
Understand: tokenization, embeddings, attention mechanism, BERT, GPT architectures
Build projects: sentiment analyzer, chatbot, text summarizer, named entity recognizer
Learn prompt engineering for LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini)
Learn RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) for building intelligent chatbots
Apply at: AI startups, big tech, product companies building voice/chat features
nlp_engineer.cost_estimate: Free via Hugging Face + Coursera audit
entrance_exams: No specific exam — portfolio and GitHub
pros: LLM revolution makes NLP engineers extremely valuable
Every product adding AI chat features
India's multilingual NLP is underserved — huge opportunity
cons: LLMs rapidly making some NLP tasks trivial

ar_vr_developer.title: AR/VR Developer (Augmented/Virtual Reality)
ar_vr_developer.description: Build immersive experiences for augmented reality, virtual reality, and mixed reality platforms for gaming, training, retail, and healthcare.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or strong programming background
Learn Unity 3D (C#) or Unreal Engine (C++) — primary AR/VR development engines
Learn: AR Foundation (Unity), ARKit (iOS), ARCore (Android), OpenXR
Get Meta Quest 2/3 or HTC Vive for VR development (borrow or buy)
Build portfolio projects: virtual tour, AR try-on experience, VR training simulation
Target companies: Accenture XR, Infosys XR, Wipro XR practice, or AR/VR startups
Meta, Apple Vision Pro (visionOS) = massive upcoming demand
ar_vr_developer.cost_estimate: Quest 2 headset: 30,000-50,000 Rs | Development: free tools
pros: Apple Vision Pro = massive developer demand
India IT firms all building XR practices
cons: Market still maturing — projects can be cancelled

database_administrator.title: Database Administrator (DBA)
database_administrator.description: Design, install, manage, and optimize databases to ensure data is available, secure, and performs well for applications and businesses.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or BCA with good SQL knowledge
Master SQL deeply: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle (enterprise standard)
Learn NoSQL: MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis for modern applications
Get certified: Oracle DBA Certified Professional, Microsoft SQL Server certifications
Learn: backup and recovery, replication, performance tuning, query optimization
Learn cloud databases: AWS RDS, Aurora, Google Cloud SQL, Azure SQL
top_institutes: Any CS college with strong SQL curriculum
pros: Can move to cloud database specialist role
cons: Being replaced partially by cloud managed databases (AWS RDS handles much automatically)
Not the most glamorous tech role

scrum_master.title: Scrum Master / Agile Coach
scrum_master.description: Facilitate agile software development teams using Scrum methodology, remove impediments, and help teams deliver value faster.
roadmap: Get any graduation — preferably in tech or business
Learn Agile and Scrum framework thoroughly (read Scrum Guide — it's free)
Get CSM (Certified Scrum Master) from Scrum Alliance OR PSM I from Scrum.org
Work as Scrum Master on a software development team
Progress to: Senior SM → Agile Coach → Release Train Engineer (SAFe) → Agile Transformation Lead
Get advanced certifications: SAFe Agilist, CEC (Certified Enterprise Coach)
scrum_master.duration: 2-day certification + 1-2 years experience to be effective
entrance_exams: PSM I (online exam only — no course required)
pros: High demand in large IT services companies: TCS, Infosys, Wipro
Good for career switchers into tech
cons: Can become a meeting coordinator rather than true coach

quality_engineer.title: Software Quality Assurance (QA) Engineer
quality_engineer.description: Test software to find bugs, ensure quality standards, and automate testing processes to deliver reliable products.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or BCA
Learn manual testing: test case writing, bug reporting, JIRA, test management tools
Learn automation testing: Selenium (Java/Python), Cypress, Playwright, Appium (mobile)
Learn API testing: Postman, REST Assured
Learn performance testing: JMeter, Gatling
Get certified: ISTQB Foundation Level certification
Apply at software companies — every product team needs QA engineers
quality_engineer.cost_estimate: ISTQB exam: 5,000-15,000 Rs | Courses: free to 10,000 Rs
pros: Lower bar to entry than development
Automation QA pay is similar to developers
Critical role — product quality depends on QA
Good for career switchers into tech
cons: Manual testing jobs declining — automation is taking over
QA sometimes seen as lower status than developers
Monotonous regression testing work at junior level
Needs to constantly keep up with new frameworks

site_reliability_engineer.title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
site_reliability_engineer.description: Apply software engineering to operations problems — ensuring large-scale systems are reliable, scalable, and efficient at companies like Google, Amazon, and Flipkart.
roadmap: Get BTech CS with strong systems and programming fundamentals
Work 2-3 years as software engineer or DevOps engineer first
Learn: Linux internals, distributed systems, networking, Kubernetes, Prometheus, Grafana
Understand: SLOs, SLIs, SLAs, error budgets, post-mortems
Learn: chaos engineering, load testing, capacity planning
Apply at: Google SRE (the originators), Amazon, Microsoft, Flipkart, Swiggy, PhonePe — all have SRE teams
top_institutes: Read 'Site Reliability Engineering' book by Google (free online)
site_reliability_engineer.cost_estimate: Self-learning via books and hands-on labs
entrance_exams: No specific exam — strong CS fundamentals + coding interview
pros: System health = business health — critical role
cons: Needs both software and ops expertise

teacher_educator.title: EdTech Professional / Online Course Creator
teacher_educator.description: Create and sell online courses, build educational content for edtech platforms, and teach millions of students globally.

requirements.min_education: Expert in your subject + teaching ability

roadmap: Develop deep expertise in a subject: coding, design, finance, yoga, language, cooking
Create your first online course on: Udemy, Coursera, Unacademy, Physics Wallah, BYJU's
Learn: video production, PowerPoint design, student engagement techniques
Build audience through: YouTube, Instagram teaching content
Create paid course on Teachable, Thinkific, or Graphy (Indian platform)
Diversify: live cohort courses, 1-on-1 mentoring, corporate training
top_institutes: No institute — your expertise is the qualification

salary.senior: 50 Lakhs - 5 Crore (top educators: Physics Wallah scale)

pros: India's edtech market is massive — JEE/NEET alone is billion-dollar industry
Physics Wallah founder Alakh Pandey is a billionaire
cons: Crowded market — hundreds of similar courses

special_educator.title: Special Educator / Inclusion Specialist
special_educator.description: Teach and support children with learning disabilities, autism, Down syndrome, ADHD, hearing impairment, and visual impairment.

requirements.min_education: B.Ed Special Education / B.Ed + D.Ed Spl. Ed

roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get B.Ed Special Education (2 years) from an RCI recognized institute
Specialize in one area: Learning Disabilities (LD), Autism Spectrum (ASD), Visual Impairment, Hearing Impairment, Intellectual Disability
Register with RCI (Rehabilitation Council of India) — mandatory
Work in: special schools, inclusive schools, rehabilitation centers, home therapy
NGOs: Action for Autism, The Promise Foundation, Ummeed Child Development Center
top_institutes: AYJNIHH Mumbai (All India Institute of Speech and Hearing)
Ramakrishna Mission Vivekananda Educational and Research Institute
pros: Growing awareness of special needs in India
Abroad opportunities: UK, Canada, Middle East
cons: Low pay in most Indian schools

academic_counselor.title: Academic Counselor / Study Abroad Consultant
academic_counselor.description: Guide students on college selection, application strategy, scholarship applications, and study abroad processes.
roadmap: Complete any graduation — psychology, education, or any field
Get certified: ICEF Agent Training Course, IELTS/TOEFL familiarity
Work with an established overseas education consultancy for 1-2 years to learn
Build knowledge: university rankings (QS, THE), program requirements, visa processes, SOP writing
Get empanelled with universities as recruitment agent (universities pay commission)
Start own counseling practice after experience
Indian students studying abroad = 1.3 million students — massive market
academic_counselor.duration: 6 months - 1 year to be independently operational

salary.senior: 20 - 60 LPA (own firm with multiple university empanelments)

entrance_exams: No formal entrance for most roles
pros: India is world's 2nd largest source of international students
Commission from universities can be significant
cons: Regulatory uncertainty in overseas education consulting
Competition from free university portals and AI tools
University commission structures can be exploitative

librarian.title: Librarian / Knowledge Manager
librarian.description: Manage library collections, facilitate access to information, and in modern roles, manage digital knowledge repositories and research databases.
roadmap: Complete any graduation in any subject
Get BLib.Sc (Bachelor of Library and Information Science) — 1 year after graduation
Get MLISc (Master of Library and Information Science) — 2 years for better roles
Clear UGC NET Library Science for university/college librarian roles
Learn: Koha LMS, DELNET, SOUL library software, digital archiving tools
Work at: schools, colleges, universities, public libraries, corporate libraries, law firm libraries
Modern libraries need: digital resource management, research support, knowledge management
librarian.duration: Graduation 3 years + BLib 1 year + MLISc 2 years

salary.senior: 15 - 30 LPA (chief librarian at top university / corporate)

pros: UGC NET qualified = college librarian (Group A post)
Corporate and law firm libraries pay well
Digital transformation creating new KM roles
cons: Very slow career progression in government
Physical library work declining with digitization
Limited awareness of modern library roles

anthropologist.title: Anthropologist / Cultural Researcher
anthropologist.description: Study human societies, cultures, evolution, and behavior through fieldwork, ethnography, and comparative research.
roadmap: Complete 12th in any stream
Get BA Anthropology (3 years)
Complete MA Anthropology (2 years) — specialize in: Cultural, Physical/Biological, Linguistic, or Archaeological Anthropology
Clear UGC NET for teaching roles or CSIR-NET for physical anthropology research
Work at: ASI (Archaeological Survey), Anthropological Survey of India, universities, NGOs, corporate UX research
PhD for research positions at institutions like TISS, JNU, HCU
pros: Anthropological Survey of India government jobs
Corporate anthropology for product/UX research is emerging
cons: Very low awareness about career paths

geographer.title: Geographer / GIS Specialist
geographer.description: Study spatial patterns of Earth's surface and apply GIS (Geographic Information Systems) to solve problems in urban planning, disaster management, environmental monitoring, and business analytics.
roadmap: Clear 12th with Geography or any stream
Get BSc/BA Geography (3 years)
Learn GIS software: ArcGIS, QGIS (free), Google Earth Engine
Complete MSc Geography or MSc in Geospatial Technology
Get certified: ESRI ArcGIS certification (gold standard)
Work at: Survey of India, ISRO (remote sensing), smart city projects, environmental consultancies, agricultural planning
pros: GIS is used in every infrastructure project
Smart City Mission creates massive demand
Can combine with CS for geo-data science roles
cons: Geography as career is little known
Private sector awareness about GIS is growing but still limited

philosopher.title: Philosopher / Ethics Consultant
philosopher.description: Study fundamental questions about knowledge, reality, ethics, and existence — increasingly applied to AI ethics, corporate ethics, and public policy.
roadmap: Complete BA Philosophy (3 years)
Complete MA Philosophy (2 years) from top university
Clear UGC NET Philosophy for teaching career
PhD for research and tenured academic positions
Emerging alternative: AI Ethics Consultant — big tech companies hire philosophers
Corporate ethics boards, bioethics committees at hospitals, policy think tanks all need philosophers
Write for public: Aeon, The Wire, Scroll, or start philosophy podcast/YouTube

salary.senior: 25 - 70 LPA (senior AI ethics lead at Google/Microsoft India)

pros: AI Ethics is massively in demand globally — philosophers are being hired at Google, Meta, OpenAI
Bioethics in hospitals and research is growing
cons: AI ethics is very new in India
Undervalued in a tech-obsessed job market

sociologist.title: Sociologist
sociologist.description: Study society, social structures, inequality, group behavior, institutions, and social change through research, surveys, and analysis.
roadmap: Complete BA Sociology or BA Social Work (3 years)
Complete MA Sociology (2 years)
Clear UGC NET Sociology for assistant professor roles
Work at: market research firms, NGOs, NSSO (National Sample Survey Office), policy organizations, government social welfare departments
Corporate social research: companies like Kantar, Nielsen, IMRB hire sociologists for market research
PhD for academic and senior research positions
pros: Government NSSO and social welfare depts hire
Research skills transferable to many sectors
cons: Low pay in many research positions
Requires PhD for serious academic career

political_scientist.title: Political Scientist
political_scientist.description: Analyze political systems, institutions, behavior, and international relations through research, teaching, and policy advising.
roadmap: Complete BA Political Science (3 years)
Complete MA Political Science from JNU, DU, HCU (2 years)
Clear UGC NET Political Science for assistant professor roles
Alternatively: work at political parties, election management, think tanks (ORF, CPR, IDFC)
Career in political journalism or TV political commentary
IAS/IFS route: political science is a popular optional paper — scores well
pros: Political consultancy is growing in India
TV political punditry = high visibility + decent income
JNU is world-class for political research
UPSC polsci optional is useful for IAS

chartered_engineer.title: Chartered Engineer / Licensed Engineer
chartered_engineer.description: A professionally certified engineer who meets rigorous competence standards set by engineering institutions — eligible for senior government and infrastructure projects.
roadmap: Complete BTech/BE in any engineering discipline
Work as engineer for minimum 5 years with progressive responsibility
Apply for Chartered Engineer status from: Institution of Engineers India (IEI) — the main Indian body
Submit professional review document detailing your engineering work and competencies
Pass interview by senior engineers
Maintain membership with CPD (Continuing Professional Development)
UK route: become Chartered Engineer through IET, IMechE, ICE — highly valued internationally
top_institutes: IMechE / ICE / IChemE (UK bodies with Indian chapters)
chartered_engineer.cost_estimate: IEI membership: 5,000-15,000 Rs | UK bodies: 25,000-60,000 Rs
pros: Required for senior roles in infrastructure and defense
Mandatory for government infrastructure project sign-offs in some states
cons: Takes 5+ years work experience before applying
Less known compared to CA or CS
India's chartered engineering culture not as strong as UK

mining_engineer.title: Mining Engineer
mining_engineer.description: Design and supervise extraction of minerals, coal, metals, and other natural resources safely and efficiently from mines.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM
Get BTech Mining Engineering from IIT (ISM) Dhanbad — top in India
Get Mine Manager's Certificate of Competency (First Class) from DGMS (Directorate General of Mines Safety)
Join Coal India, NMDC, Vedanta, Hindustan Zinc, MOIL as graduate engineer trainee
Get Mines Foreman certificate and Mine Manager certificate for senior roles
Underground mine experience is essential — don't avoid the field
top_institutes: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad (best mining college in Asia)
pros: Coal India is one of world's largest employers
Very high demand in mining sector
Site allowances add to salary substantially
cons: Underground work is physically demanding and risky
Dust and health hazards with precautions

petroleum_engineer.title: Petroleum Engineer
petroleum_engineer.description: Develop methods to extract oil and gas from reservoirs efficiently and safely, working for oil companies, oilfield services, and energy consultants.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM
Get BTech Petroleum Engineering from IIT (ISM) Dhanbad or UPES Dehradun
Learn reservoir simulation software: Eclipse, Petrel (Schlumberger), CMG
Join ONGC, Oil India, Reliance Industries, or international oilfield services: Schlumberger (SLB), Halliburton, Baker Hughes (all have India offices)
Get certified by SPE (Society of Petroleum Engineers)
Offshore/onshore rotational experience is essential
top_institutes: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) Rae Bareli
pros: ONGC/Oil India salaries are among best PSU salaries
International opportunities: Middle East, UK, Norway, USA
India's energy security needs more petroleum engineers
cons: Offshore rotational work (28 days on, 28 days off)
Environmental criticism of fossil fuel industry
Digital oilfield transition changing skill needs

metallurgical_engineer.title: Metallurgical Engineer / Materials Engineer
metallurgical_engineer.description: Study and develop metals, alloys, ceramics, composites, and advanced materials for aerospace, automotive, electronics, and construction industries.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCM
Get BTech Metallurgical & Materials Engineering from IIT
Focus on: physical metallurgy, thermodynamics, materials characterization (XRD, SEM, TEM)
Do internships at: SAIL, Tata Steel, Vedanta, NALCO, BHEL
Clear GATE Metallurgy for PSU jobs: SAIL, NTPC, BHEL, NMDC
Specialize in: semiconductor materials, nano materials, battery materials (EV sector) — future is here
pros: Battery materials for EV is the hottest new area
Steel and aluminium industry always needs metallurgists
PSU like SAIL offer good jobs
cons: Less known than mainstream engineering branches
Field work in steel plants can be harsh
PSU salaries lower than IT sector

nuclear_engineer.title: Nuclear Engineer / Nuclear Scientist
nuclear_engineer.description: Work on nuclear energy generation, radiation applications in medicine and industry, and nuclear safety at BARC, NPCIL, and related organizations.

requirements.medical: Strict medical fitness including radiation sensitivity screening

roadmap: Clear 12th PCM with high marks (85%+)
Get BTech in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Chemical, Metallurgy, or Physics/Chemistry MSc
Clear BARC Training School Entrance Exam (OCES/DGFS) — one of most prestigious science exams in India
Complete 1-year residential training at BARC Mumbai (stipend provided)
Join BARC as Scientific Officer or join NPCIL (Nuclear Power Corporation) as Engineer Trainee
Progress: Scientific Officer C → D → E → F → G (Distinguished Scientist)
nuclear_engineer.cost_estimate: Government funded — BARC training pays stipend of 28,000/month
pros: Work on India's nuclear program — national pride
cons: Postings at BARC Mumbai or Tarapur (limited cities)
No private sector equivalent in India

biomedical_engineer.title: Biomedical Engineer
biomedical_engineer.description: Design and develop medical devices, diagnostic equipment, prosthetics, and hospital equipment by combining engineering with medicine.
roadmap: Clear 12th PCMB or PCM
Get BTech Biomedical Engineering (4 years)
Learn: medical imaging, biomechanics, biosensors, signal processing
Do internships at hospitals, medical device companies
Join: GE Healthcare, Philips Healthcare, Siemens Healthineers, Trivitron Healthcare (Indian company)
Clear GATE BM for PSU/government hospital equipment roles
FDA/CDSCO regulatory knowledge for product development roles
pros: Medical device industry growing in India
Government health schemes increasing hospital equipment demand
cons: Needs both engineering and biology knowledge

renewable_energy_engineer.title: Renewable Energy Engineer / Solar Energy Expert
renewable_energy_engineer.description: Design, install, and optimize renewable energy systems — solar, wind, biomass, and energy storage for India's clean energy transition.
roadmap: Complete BTech in Electrical, Mechanical, Electronics, or Energy Engineering
Learn solar PV design software: PVsyst, HOMER, AutoCAD Electrical
Get certified: NABCEP (North American Board of Certified Energy Practitioners) or TERI solar certification
Join: Adani Green, ReNew Power, Tata Power Solar, Greenko, Azure Power
Government projects: NTPC Renewable, SECI (Solar Energy Corporation of India)
Specialize: solar design, wind analysis, battery storage, grid integration, EV charging infrastructure
pros: India is world's 3rd largest solar capacity — massive growth
International funding flowing into Indian renewables
cons: Outdoor site work in harsh conditions
Competition from Chinese manufacturers affecting sector

transportation_engineer.title: Transportation Engineer / Traffic Engineer
transportation_engineer.description: Plan, design, and optimize transportation infrastructure — highways, metro systems, airports, ports, and intelligent traffic management.
roadmap: Complete BTech Civil Engineering
Specialize in Transportation Engineering during BTech/MTech
Learn: VISSIM, Synchro (traffic simulation), AutoCAD Civil 3D, GIS for transport
Clear GATE for government roles: NHAI, MoRTH, Metro Rail corporations
Join: L&T Infrastructure, AECOM, SYSTRA (metro design firms), DMRC, BMRC
Metro rail, expressway, and bullet train projects all need transport engineers
pros: India's infrastructure boom — NHAI highways, metro expansions, bullet train
Bullet train project alone needs thousands of engineers
PM Gati Shakti national infrastructure plan

structural_engineer.title: Structural Engineer
structural_engineer.description: Analyze and design load-bearing structures — buildings, bridges, dams, towers — ensuring they can withstand forces safely.
roadmap: Complete BTech Civil Engineering
Specialize in structural engineering — learn STAAD Pro, ETABS, SAP2000, AutoCAD
Get MTech Structural Engineering from IIT for better roles
Join: structural consulting firms, CPWD, NDMA (disaster management structures), nuclear plant design (BARC)
Get SE (Structural Engineer) license from state engineering boards
High-rise buildings, bridges, metro stations — all need structural engineers
pros: Seismic zone India creates constant demand
International opportunities in Middle East, Singapore
cons: Responsibility for human safety = high pressure

geotechnical_engineer.title: Geotechnical Engineer
geotechnical_engineer.description: Study soil and rock behavior to design foundations, tunnels, embankments, and slopes safely for construction projects.
roadmap: Complete BTech Civil Engineering
Specialize in Geotechnical Engineering during MTech
Learn: soil investigation, PLAXIS (geotechnical software), FLAC, GEO5
Do field work: borehole drilling, SPT tests, CPT tests
Join: RITES, CESMEC, Fugro, Golder Associates or work on tunnelling projects
Metro tunnels, dam foundations, highway embankments all need geotechnical engineers
pros: Every major project needs geotech investigation
cons: Less glamorous vs structural or transportation

nanotechnologist.title: Nanotechnologist / Nanomaterials Scientist
nanotechnologist.description: Work at the scale of atoms and molecules to develop new materials, drug delivery systems, electronics, and sensors with extraordinary properties.
roadmap: Complete BTech in Metallurgy, Chemical, ECE, or BSc Physics/Chemistry with high grades
Get MSc/MTech Nanotechnology from IIT or specialized institutes
PhD is almost mandatory — with funding from CSIR/DBT/DST
Learn: electron microscopy (SEM/TEM), XRD, spectroscopy, cleanroom fabrication
Work at: DRDO (nano-explosives/armor), pharma (nano drug delivery), ISRO (nano coatings), semiconductor industry
India's Nano Mission under DST funds nanotechnology research
pros: Cutting-edge science — work at atomic scale
Cancer nanotechnology is huge growth area
cons: Few industry jobs in India currently
PhD is mandatory for serious roles
Nanoparticle safety concerns are ongoing research topic

fintech_developer.title: Fintech Developer / Payments Engineer
fintech_developer.description: Build financial technology products — UPI systems, digital payments, lending platforms, trading systems, and insurance tech.
roadmap: Get BTech CS or equivalent software engineering background
Learn: Python/Java/Go, REST APIs, payment gateway integration
Understand: UPI stack, NPCI protocols, RBI regulations for payments
Learn: NBFC lending tech, risk scoring APIs, KYC/AML integration
Build projects: integrate Razorpay/PayU API, build mock UPI flow, lending dashboard
Join: PhonePe, Paytm, Razorpay, CRED, BharatPe, Slice, Zepto Pay — all are fintech firms
fintech_developer.duration: BTech 4 years + 6 months to learn fintech stack
pros: India's UPI is world's largest payment system — massive ecosystem
Fintech unicorns: PhonePe, Paytm, Razorpay all valued billions
Very high salary at top fintechs
cons: RBI regulation changes can disrupt business models
Payment failures = customer anger and business loss

health_informatics.title: Health Informatics / Healthcare IT Professional
health_informatics.description: Manage healthcare data systems, electronic health records (EHR), hospital management systems, and healthcare analytics.

requirements.min_education: BTech CS / BSc Health IT / MBA Health

roadmap: Get BTech CS or Healthcare IT degree
Learn: HL7/FHIR (healthcare data standards), Epic/Cerner EHR systems
Get certified: AHIMA RHIA certification, HIMSS CPHIMS
Learn clinical coding: ICD-10, CPT codes (important for US healthcare market)
Join: Practo, Apollo hospitals IT, Fortis IT, government health IT under NHP (National Health Portal)
Ayushman Bharat Digital Health Mission (ABDM) creating massive demand
